name: American Defense News
subject: Victor Davis Hanson on DVD
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losi
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z0iiq40l19pu4haoolsn7bhs8lr0n8spmgadageo_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicboj4obh6go72d3mmhqn4o5h63imas9mepo6fctic1g76p5lcioj0tj1ehjrccpgcv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj661pbbd37m8qmcd70mdj3fc5lclp238h1e8he4933cpjm1ob5c9h6coh5u)
This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z9vl6fiqmpdqt2j8l4miu0bpauuid6ul03esvgb0_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c3gmaoj2cph2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zbtha8s9oh4v3lbsv6u5okbv1l19d4tvs88kdji8_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c3gmaoj2cph2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z4lmsfse2vhlnfbdgd1jr72nsstr5qj93j44qkv0_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c3gmaoj2cph2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

name: Kat Cammack
subject: Happy Thanksgiving!
body:
I wanted to reach out and wish you and your family a very happy Thanksgiving!
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ln1D5rwKNnKgxxeefWgPz0vGnxRj2F2asXZrS3J6uQBE5UO_H7SXGJvvfumLUK-o9k6gXGjRlN5Nw5us6RcR2eOzux9FJvhZ2-DPiStDN8yGT-j08OSrJoZ8wN766t8w87xsuZjrz-zxVpXUQmfka625pn15E489&c=WVWTN9nUgtGAa6DSsnNdikIgVQHWEz7gcR92JU6AI4kRid5K3r-nWA==&ch=BRK6bVu1k78oIjSAMDNqEHcYOSwy143TbqWSWgFbf2rqlFlRXKOCWw==)
---
| Friend,
I wanted to reach out and wish you and your family a very happy Thanksgiving!
This Holiday season may not be like the previous years, but we must always remember to come together and cherish the love and affection of our families and friends. Thanksgiving is a time-honored American tradition that reminds us what truly matters, each other.

name: Shontel Brown
subject: Happy Thanksgiving
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
Here’s what I’m thankful for.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38982234/317927041/1329859415?refcode=EM_C_211125Thanksgiving_H_SB_90DO_3_NG_N_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YzgwNTBmYi1mNzRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i9kQzhuK28XFjmBjYvLrwKQledy9ngrLnIbsxl5Lo6M=) Happy Thanksgiving, Peter.

I wanted to take a moment to reflect on everything I’m thankful for. This has been a monumental year, and I wouldn’t be in Congress today without the people of Ohio 11, my friends and family, and every one of you.

It’s my honor to serve the people of Akron and Cleveland, and I look forward to the work I’ll accomplish in Congress with you by my side.

I hope you’ll take a moment today to think on what you're thankful for and share in love and community with those around you.

Thank you and Happy Thanksgiving,

Shontel Brown |
As a Cuyahoga County Council member and Chairwoman of the Cuyahoga County Democratic Party, Shontel Brown has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. Now, as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District, she will fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and equity and justice for all. **Will you join her and be the change we need?**
---

| | Happy Thanksgiving, folks! I won’t take up too much of your time. I know there are turkey trots to be run, parades and football games to be watched, and pumpkin pies to be baked -- but I wanted to take a quick moment to express my gratitude for all of you. I didn’t get to Congress alone -- I have each and every one of you to thank for that. Whether you contribute to my campaign, knock on doors, or even simply read emails from my team and I, your support is truly invaluable. I hope you all have a wonderful Thanksgiving with friends and family. Be well,
Elaine
---

name: Jasmine
subject: I’m thankful for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jasmine Beach-Ferrara for Congress
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38982359/317927206/459488397?refcode=jas_headerlogo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzgwNTBmYi1mNzRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KE4fcu08eX6KVLAVBgt3-TyAo-aM6B3f14ZQcAixles=)

| | I have a lot to be thankful for, Peter. My family, our health, the many blessings in our lives. This Thanksgiving, I wanted to take a moment to say how thankful I am for the grassroots support you’ve shown us over the last several months. When we first launched this journey together, no one could have imagined we would be in this position. Reaching almost every fundraising goal we set, organizing and talking to voters all across the district, and showing what building a campaign built on hope, love and unity looks like. Our grassroots momentum even scared our opponent out of his home district! Seriously, none of this would have been possible without each and every one of you. So as you enjoy this day spent with your loved ones eating loads of food, reflecting on what you’re thankful for, just know that I’m grateful for you. _Thank you for everything._ Happy Thanksgiving from my family to yours, Jasmine
---

# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38982375/317927251/823540626?refcode=ea.4b8050fb-f74d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ms=ea.4b8050fb-f74d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjgwNTBmYi1mNzRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mtJ6tQngr_0j-2el6xdUGZLlXHhmrcCOBckU8ojtNYw=&emci=763be41e-c54b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=4b8050fb-f74d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=1049176)
From my family to yours, Happy Thanksgiving, Peter. I’ve always loved this holiday. It’s not only a time for family, food, and football, it’s a time for grateful reflection. This past year has been difficult for most everybody. But I’m thankful for neighbors who help out, health care providers who heal, and educators who keep teaching our children. And I’m thankful for our frontline workers who kept making things happen, even during a pandemic. To respond in gratitude, thank someone who’s helped you, give a little more to charity or church, and be there when others need you. Happy Thanksgiving! Roy

name: David and Ian, Never Again PAC
subject: A lot to be thankful for
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEVER AGAIN PAC
body:
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38982386/317927291/-2023352048?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYzODA1MGZiLWY3NGQtZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=UuUt_14xO-FdZUxuRTmUVitFGyZ-NyexNFKGb2Wq4HI=&emci=4448cb4b-a84c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=638050fb-f74d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=16335001) Happy Thanksgiving, team!

There's a lot to be grateful for today -- President Biden in the White House, Democrats in control of both chambers of Congress, progress on the issues that matter most to us, and so much more.

But today, we're especially grateful for all of you.

Look, today isn't just Thanksgiving. It also marks six months since we started Never Again PAC. Since May, thousands of people from across the country (47 states, to be exact) have stepped up to join us in our work to defend our democracy, and we're so thankful for all the support we've received.

So team, we want to take a moment to wish you a safe and happy Thanksgiving and thank you again for being a part of this team. Thanks,

David and Ian
Co-founders
Never Again PAC

| PAID FOR BY NEVER AGAIN PAC

We’re so fortunate to live in the greatest and freest country the world has ever known. As Americans, we’ve been afforded opportunities that most people around the world can only dream of. That’s why it’s so important that we defend our American values when they come under attack. Peter, I don’t need to tell you that it’s been a tough year for our country. From open borders to skyrocketing inflation to a humiliating withdrawal from Afghanistan, Joe Biden is threatening to turn the American dream into a nightmare. That’s why I’m so grateful for patriotic folks like you who are standing by my side to fight back against his radical agenda and save our great country. Thank you for all your tremendous support. And I wish you and your family a safe and Happy Thanksgiving! Casey Wardynski

name: Connie Weiss
subject: No End in Sight on High Fuel Prices
body:
The fuel prices continue to rise, and we're all facing larger bills to heat our homes this winter. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8185%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=8cekaY1dGJuevWB6z%2fpALA&sysid=1)

| | |

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c18202%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9Jkv2GQFAq2OqFfCHf8IVw&sysid=1)
No End in Sight on Higher Fuel Prices

The fuel prices continue to rise, and we're all facing larger bills to heat our homes this winter. Yet, we keep hearing that the Biden Administration is aware and willing to help. Still, Energy Secretary Jennifer Granholm can't name a single thing Biden has done to lower fuel prices. Instead, they continue to ban oil and gas leasing on federal lands and talk of shutting down another pipeline.

At [CaucusRoom.com](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c18203%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4P1QkG33ouSD4UA7RdX5xg&sysid=1), members are free to discuss ideas, hold honest conversations and form their opinions without being overwhelmed or suppressed by the liberal bias inherent in Twitter, Facebook, and other platforms.

Parents, neighbors, friends, colleagues, and conservatives around the country use [CaucusRoom.com](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c18203%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4P1QkG33ouSD4UA7RdX5xg&sysid=1) every day to cut through the noise and vitriol of the left and establish an authentic online community. name: Kevin Hern
subject: Happy Thanksgiving
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Hern For Congress
body:
Wishing a happy Thanksgiving to you and yours today. Read more >>
| | |
---
Happy Thanksgiving, Peter! I hope that you are spending today relaxing and enjoying with family, a lot of good food, and maybe even some football. Today I am incredibly grateful for all the blessings I’ve received in this life. My wonderful wife, our amazing children, and every single one of my supporters. It is an honor and a privilege to represent the good people of Oklahoma’s 1st District in Congress. Together we are going to take back America, and preserve our Oklahoma way of life. Please join me in gratitude today, and let your loved ones know just how much you appreciate them. Thankfully,
Kevin Hern

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: What I’m grateful for
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |
---
Hi there -- The Hassan family has a long-standing tradition of gathering together to share gratitude and turkey each Thanksgiving. And thanks to vaccines and safety guidelines, I’m looking forward to sharing the holiday with our extended family this year. While things have certainly improved from where our country was a year ago, we cannot let this year’s holiday come and go without reflecting on the challenges we’ve faced -- and acknowledging all that we have to be thankful for. First and foremost, I am thankful for the resilience and flexibility that Americans have demonstrated as they grappled with the pandemic, adapted to new realities, and worked to take care of and protect each other. So I am grateful for the 195 million Americans who are fully vaccinated against COVID-19, the brave children who have begun to receive vaccines, and for everyone who has already gotten their booster shot. And Americans have urged each other forward, despite hardship and change, with an inspiring sense of purpose. That sense of purpose and determination helped spur Congress to complete the Bipartisan Infrastructure Package that will help people all over our country. I am particularly grateful that for New Hampshire, that means roughly $ 2 billion to help fix our bridges and roads, expand access to high-speed internet, provide clean drinking water and protect our coastal communities, among other things. **Lastly, people all across this country have continued the work of making our country a more inclusive and stronger place. So I’m also grateful for you, friend, for joining me in the fight to make life better for all Americans and Granite Staters. Thank you for all you do.** Have a very happy Thanksgiving. With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

| | Happy Thanksgiving, folks! I’m taking a break from the campaign emails to simply wish you and your family a very happy holiday. Thanksgiving is an interesting holiday for me as a Native American -- while I have a lot to be thankful for, I’m also reminded of the hardship and violence Native people have faced, and continue to go through, in this country. It’s exactly why I’m running for Congress, because I believe human dignity is a human right. Our message is resonating and I’m thankful for the outpouring of support I’ve received from y’all since starting my campaign. I hope you all get some time today to relax with friends and family, and reflect on what you’re thankful for. Talk soon,
Charles

name: John & Dena Cranley
subject: Wishing you and your family a happy Thanksgiving
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the John Cranley Committee
body:
John Cranley for Governor

Friends,

We don’t want to take too much of your time today — hopefully, you’re already settling in to celebrate with those you love.

We just wanted to reach out to wish you a very Happy Thanksgiving and to extend our thanks: You’ve shown us so much support this year. We’ll never forget it.

On Thanksgiving, we generally take time to deliver food to folks in our community who need it. We’re always reminded that the greatest service we can do on this earth is to be good to one another.

Whatever you are doing, we hope that your day is filled with kindness, love, and compassion.

Thank you & best wishes this holiday season,

John & Dena Cranley

name: Andy Beshear
subject: A lot to be grateful for today
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
I have a lot to be thankful for today: my wife, Britainy, our children, Will and Lila, our fur-baby, Winnie, this beautiful commonwealth that we call home, and the opportunity to serve as your Governor. Happy Thanksgiving, Peter!

I have a lot to be thankful for today: my wife, Britainy, our children, Will and Lila, our regularly skunked dog, Winnie, this beautiful commonwealth that we call home, and the opportunity to serve as your Governor.

But today, I am especially grateful for all of you. Whether you've been with us from my very first campaign or just recently joined the team: thank you. Your support is helping us build a better future for all Kentuckians, and I am humbled to have you alongside me in this important work.

I know this has been a difficult year for many and our celebrations may still look a little different from years past, but I hope you'll join me in taking time today to give thanks for the blessings in our lives.

Wishing you a happy, safe, and meaningful Thanksgiving,

Andy

| PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: go light on the Old Bay!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Van Hollen for Senate
body:
| |
---
Friends, Like many others, this year our family will be gathering around the table for the first 'normal' Thanksgiving celebration since the pandemic hit in 2020. More than ever, we are extremely grateful for the fact that we are able to come together in person with extended family — and for the vaccines that made that possible. I am also thankful for the thousands of frontline workers, health care personnel and volunteers who helped neighbors in need and the most vulnerable in our communities this past year. And for you, and the millions of others, who continue to stand up to defend our democracy and push for real progress to improve the lives of working families. **There is still much work to be done, but we have come a long way. After one of the darkest periods in our history, we are moving forward on a number of fronts.** Sure, it hasn't been smooth — but change is happening. The infrastructure modernization initiative is already making a difference: I joined Transportation Secretary Buttigieg in Baltimore earlier this week to announce an important new investment in our transit systems. Next, we have to enact the other major part of our overall plan to expand opportunities for every American, reduce the financial squeeze on families, and address the climate crisis. **In order to keep moving forward we must tap the same people power in 2022 as we did last November.** Thank you for your thoughtful, active engagement. That's what gives me optimism. And it's what will protect our democracy against those who seek to diminish it. Have a wonderful and Happy Thanksgiving — and don't put too much Old Bay on that turkey! Chris

clean_body: | | Friends, Like many others, this year our family will be gathering around the table for the first 'normal' Thanksgiving celebration since the pandemic hit in 2020. More than ever, we are extremely grateful for the fact that we are able to come together in person with extended family — and for the vaccines that made that possible. I am also thankful for the thousands of frontline workers, health care personnel and volunteers who helped neighbors in need and the most vulnerable in our communities this past year. And for you, and the millions of others, who continue to stand up to defend our democracy and push for real progress to improve the lives of working families. There is still much work to be done, but we have come a long way. After one of the darkest periods in our history, we are moving forward on a number of fronts. Sure, it hasn't been smooth — but change is happening. The infrastructure modernization initiative is already making a difference: I joined Transportation Secretary Buttigieg in Baltimore earlier this week to announce an important new investment in our transit systems. Next, we have to enact the other major part of our overall plan to expand opportunities for every American, reduce the financial squeeze on families, and address the climate crisis. In order to keep moving forward we must tap the same people power in 2022 as we did last November. Thank you for your thoughtful, active engagement. That's what gives me optimism. And it's what will protect our democracy against those who seek to diminish it. Have a wonderful and Happy Thanksgiving — and don't put too much Old Bay on that turkey! Chris * | Grassroots supporters like you help our campaign make the investments it will take to re-elect Chris in 2022 and protect our Democratic Senate majority: | = | = ---|--- PAID FOR BY Van Hollen for Senate Van Hollen for Senate | 10605 Concord Street, Suite 202 | Kensington, MD, 20895 If you need to, click to receive only our most important emails or you can unsubscribe here: You can also =.

name: Freedom Caucus
subject: DOJ Whistleblower
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Freedom Fund
body:
| |
---
We knew Attorney General Merrick Garland was an incompetent partisan, but _**new whistleblower evidence says Garland may be a criminal, too**_.

In October, we learned that the Biden White House conspired with woke special interests to sic the FBI on concerned parents and brand them **" domestic terrorists."** Amid the public backlash against this abuse of power, Garland told Congress the Justice Department would never weaponize the Patriot Act to tyrannize parents in this way.

But now, a whistleblower inside DOJ has come forward with hard evidence contradicting Garland's sworn testimony. **Documents show the FBI 's Counterterrorism Division (!) has indeed opened investigations, at Garland's direction. ** They are categorizing parents' free speech with an FBI "threat tag."

** [ Please help the Freedom Caucus stop the lies now! ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58872112:J-867O2NJ:m:1:3253819041:C8B376BDF90D32E0B0ECF045EBB37C1D:r) **

This is tyranny, plain and simple. That's why they're hiding it. That's why Garland lied about it. The same people who opened our borders and ignited a national crime wave is cracking down on moms and dads defending their kids from racist propaganda and sexual predators.

Conservatives in the House Freedom Caucus are doing everything they can to unearth the truth and fight Garland's abuse of power. But until we can win back the House, we cannot issue subpoenas or compel testimony, or finally reform our politicized Justice Department.

** [ That's where the House Freedom Fund comes in. ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58872112:J-867O2NJ:m:1:3253819041:C8B376BDF90D32E0B0ECF045EBB37C1D:r) **

When - not if - Republicans win control of Congress next year, it won't be enough to have another Democrat-lite majority. To make America great again, _**we need to take the fight for America to the Left.**_

Only principled, fighting conservatives can be trusted to finish the fight against Joe Biden's socialist bullies. And only HFF will call out the Republican candidates not worth supporting. In the primaries, in the general election, and then in 2023, we will fight for you.

[ **Click here to see our candidates.** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58872112:J-867O2NJ:m:1:3253819041:C8B376BDF90D32E0B0ECF045EBB37C1D:r)

[ **Click here to support our cause.** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58872112:J-867O2NJ:m:1:3253819041:C8B376BDF90D32E0B0ECF045EBB37C1D:r)

Thank you for considering this urgent request and for doing to much to fight for conservative leadership in Washington.

Sincerely,
Ray Yonkura
Executive Director
House Freedom Fund

Friends,

I wanted to take the time to wish you and your family a Happy Thanksgiving!

After a year of so much difficulty and uncertainty, it’s more important than ever that we take stock of the blessings in our life.

I’m so thankful that this year I am able to spend this holiday with my family, and for the front-line workers who have kept our country safe during the throes of the pandemic.

And I am also so honored to have supporters like you by my side as I launched this campaign. I would not be able to get to this point without you.

Whether you are able to be with your family or not, I hope you are having a wonderful day.

Thank you and wishing you a Happy Thanksgiving!

Brad

| | |

| I am so grateful for your support. Friend, Happy Thanksgiving! These past couple of years have shown us all what truly matters and what we should be grateful for: our family, friends, loved ones, our health, a roof over our heads, and so much more. **These two years have also highlighted the inequities in our system and underscores our responsibility to help those who don't have access to some of these things.** **** In the next few months, this race is going to heat up, but I want to take a moment today to say how truly grateful I am for each and every one of you who've been here, showing your support. **** Because of you, we’ve launched a completely grassroots campaign that’s focused on what the people of Pittsburgh need—not corporate interests. We’ve opened a campaign office, hired new staff, and are working to make our community a better place. **** Emily, the girls, and I will all be celebrating together today, thinking about how grateful we are for all that we have, and the opportunity that you’ve given us. We hope you’re able to spend today with your families, friends, and loved ones as well. **** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38987432/317950034/-2042008336?refcode=em_20211125-x-JD-thanksgiving-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDAwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDZmOGI1Yy0wMDRlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T2HVStMLZAZQtor8OITII--Efm5ZqtCbyerQyk1_I1Q=)** **** Stay warm! **** Jerry Dickinson **** ****_**_**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38987434/317950036/-2042008336?refcode=em_20211125-x-JD-thanksgiving-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDAwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDZmOGI1Yy0wMDRlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T2HVStMLZAZQtor8OITII--Efm5ZqtCbyerQyk1_I1Q=)**_**_**** ****

clean_body: | | | | | I am so grateful for your support. Friend, Happy Thanksgiving! These past couple of years have shown us all what truly matters and what we should be grateful for: our family, friends, loved ones, our health, a roof over our heads, and so much more. These two years have also highlighted the inequities in our system and underscores our responsibility to help those who don't have access to some of these things. ** In the next few months, this race is going to heat up, but I want to take a moment today to say how truly grateful I am for each and every one of you who've been here, showing your support. Because of you, we’ve launched a completely grassroots campaign that’s focused on what the people of Pittsburgh need—not corporate interests. We’ve opened a campaign office, hired new staff, and are working to make our community a better place. Emily, the girls, and I will all be celebrating together today, thinking about how grateful we are for all that we have, and the opportunity that you’ve given us. We hope you’re able to spend today with your families, friends, and loved ones as well. = Stay warm! name: Sen. Rob Ortt
subject: Happy Thanksgiving
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB ORTT FOR STATE SENATE
body:
🦃
| | | |
---
---
|
---
| |
---
Dear Friend,
It's the holiday season, and today is one of my favorites: Thanksgiving.
The First Thanksgiving was celebrated in 1621 by Pilgrims and Native Americans in the New World. Since 1789, Thanksgiving has been celebrated on and off nationally, until it was made a permanent federal holiday in 1942.
Whether your favorite dish is turkey, stuffing, cranberry sauce, or all of the above, Thanksgiving is most importantly a day to acknowledge what we're thankful for as New Yorkers and Americans.
I am thankful to live in the best country in the world, and I am forever thankful for the family, friends, and loved ones I celebrate with on this holiday.
Happy Thanksgiving!

Sincerely,
---
|
---
---
| |

name: Heidi St. John
subject: Happy Thanksgiving
body:
No nation in history has done more good for more people than these United States.
---
| | | | | |
---
| Fellow Patriots,
Today marks the 400th anniversary of the first Thanksgiving. Until recently, this was a time for gathering together and thanking God for His blessing and provision in our lives. But we have become an ungrateful nation, relentlessly divided by identity politics, and constantly told America was conceived in sin and birthed in hatred. That's a lie. No nation in history has done more good for more people than these United States.
America must say no to the liberals, anarchists, and mainstream media who deny God's very existence and constantly seek to pit us against one another. God did indeed shed His grace on this great nation and it's up to us to "crown thy good with brotherhood" instead of mutual hatred and division. I'm Heidi St John, and I'm running for Congress to help heal and restore this exceptional nation and to say no to those who would destroy America.
For Liberty!
---

name: Mark Holland
subject: Let’s give thanks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Holland for Kansas
body:
Mark Holland is running for US Senate because Kansas and America deserve a strong, courageous leader who leads with faith, speaks the truth, and is willing to stand up to extremists across the political spectrum. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/f257003a-5249-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8/1708322f-014e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzA4MzIyZi0wMTRlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Oh-JHgXBrfcZwCG8vETy0ozsES5njpWp0psjicC4oU4=&id=103697760)
---
| Dear friend,

Thanksgiving is my favorite national holiday, and it is uniquely American. A whole day set aside for gratitude. I am grateful for faith, family, and freedom. I am grateful to live in the great state of Kansas!

For what are you grateful this year?

Of course, the Thanksgiving table can be fraught with all kinds of landmines. My mom often prefaces Thanksgiving dinner, “I don’t want anyone talking politics! I just want to enjoy our family!” All told, we know who is who, and we love each other all the same. That is how it is supposed to be. The past two years have been trying for everyone, and yet at this special time of year, even amidst difficulty, we strive for gratitude.

As you give thanks this year, please make a donation to a cause in honor of something or someone for which or for whom you are grateful. Your donation is a simple act of gratitude that can tear down divisions and build up unity in Kansas and in America. Now more than ever.

In gratitude,

Mark

---

If you’d like to unsubscribe, | Dear friend, Thanksgiving is my favorite national holiday, and it is uniquely American. A whole day set aside for gratitude. I am grateful for faith, family, and freedom. I am grateful to live in the great state of Kansas! For what are you grateful this year? Of course, the Thanksgiving table can be fraught with all kinds of landmines. My mom often prefaces Thanksgiving dinner, “I don’t want anyone talking politics! I just want to enjoy our family!” All told, we know who is who, and we love each other all the same. That is how it is supposed to be. The past two years have been trying for everyone, and yet at this special time of year, even amidst difficulty, we strive for gratitude. As you give thanks this year, please make a donation to a cause in honor of something or someone for which or for whom you are grateful. Your donation is a simple act of gratitude that can tear down divisions and build up unity in Kansas and in America. Now more than ever. In gratitude, Mark | | | = Meet Mark: Reverend Mark Holland is a fourth generation Kansan and a third generation United Methodist Pastor. name: Kara Hahn
subject: Here's why I look forward to Thanksgiving every year:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kara Hahn for Congress Kara Hahn for Congress
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38988570/317955183/922507959?refcode=em21_emailheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTQ1M2NjMi0wMTRlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iG_Qsw-K8qGHu89aSnoX2wesilIlIWdpbXXxQUZmjDQ=)

Happy Thanksgiving to you and your family, friend!

There's so much I have to be thankful for this year -- from our frontline health care workers who have given so much to our communities throughout the pandemic to our troops who are spending this holiday away from their families. I also wanted to reach out and give thanks to everyone who has lent my campaign a helping hand this year. As I've taken this step to run for Congress, it's meant the world to have supporters old and new go the extra mile to help.

Like so many of us, I look forward to this holiday all year round. Not just because of the delicious food that we get to enjoy, but because it urges everyone to gather and appreciate time together with their loved ones.

My family usually hosts the whole Gerry/Hahn clan. My husband handles the turkey, my sister-in-law makes sweet potatoes, and everyone looks forward to our family's traditional dessert of snickerdoodles.

I'm in charge of the baked Mac 'n Cheese; it's my dad's go-to recipe, and I take a lot of pride in carrying the tradition forward. (I'm also going to share the recipe below because I think it's the best Mac 'n Cheese in Suffolk County _\-- although I may be a little biased!)_

After we eat too much and pile our dishes in the sink, we head to the beach for a good walk.

**This is all to say that I love Thanksgiving, and I'm particularly grateful to get to celebrate in the way we usually would again.** I hope you get to do the same this year too.

Have a wonderful rest of your day and check out dad's baked mac and cheese recipe if you're scrambling to prepare last minute -- like we always do!

Happy Thanksgiving,

Kara

| **_Dad's Mac'n Cheese Recipe:_ (Makes 2 half trays)

What you'll need:**
* _1 quart whole milk_
* _1 stick butter_
* _3 heaping tablespoons flour_
* _3 lbs cheddar cheese( 1⁄2 mild 1⁄2 sharp)_
* _3 teaspoons mustard_
* _Save 1⁄2 lb cheese for top_
* _2 boxes of elbow macaroni_

**What to do:**
* Begin cooking elbow pasta, simultaneously start the cheese sauce.
* Pour milk into a big pot on the stove on low-med heat (3.5). Stir in flour, butter, mustard, and slowly add cheese while stirring continuously, so it doesn't burn on the bottom of the pot.
* Drain and Pour cooked elbows into a flat pan. Pour cooked cheese sauce onto elbows and stir in the pan so it evenly spreads throughout.
* Sprinkle leftover cheese on top and cook for 1 hour at 325-350 F.

---

* * *

name: Nate & Team Sandvig
subject: Happy Thanksgiving! 🦃
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sandvig for Congress
body:
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/48cc7c9e03161852041ad8cde91a9694/37283/eeffdc7f87be6ff5/0d9cd1ee5be559dbc3d6b838967d376c/37283)
---
Friends, Good morning and Happy Thanksgiving! We’re writing to wish you all the best as our nation celebrates Thanksgiving.
We hope you’re looking forward to a great day of food, fellowship, and some football with your family and friends today, and have an outstanding holiday weekend.
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/48cc7c9e03161852041ad8cde91a9694/37283/eeffdc7f87be6ff5/630355556022f787c3d6b838967d376c/37283)
---
It’s been a tough year for our country. But we still have so much to be thankful for.
Today, let us reflect on our gratitude for family, for God’s grace, and for this amazing American experiment. And let us remember all those who are away from their loved ones and the comfort of home today, defending our freedom in service to our nation.

Here at Team Sandvig, we’re grateful for YOU too. Together, we’re leading the charge to restore sanity in Oregon and in Washington, D.C.

Happy Thanksgiving to you and your loved ones! \- Nate & Team Sandvig
---

name: Matt Castelli
subject: Happy Thanksgiving!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Castelli for Congress
body:
| Friends,

Thanksgiving is a chance to reflect on what we are grateful for. Today and everyday, I am thankful for my family, friends and each of you who have supported our campaign. Thank you for standing with me as I run to be the next Representative for NY-21.

It has been an honor and a privilege travelling across the district getting to hear from so many of you, and I continue to be thankful for your support.

I hope you have a great holiday. Please also be sure to check in on friends, family, and strangers at the start of this holiday season, which can be such a challenging time for many, and extend to them the warmth and belonging they may not know how to ask for.

Happy Thanksgiving,

Matt Castelli

| | Happy Thanksgiving — from our families to yours.

Your support has meant so much to all of us here at Team Malinowski. It is because of your hard work that we are where we are today! We hope you are energized to continue fighting alongside us this cycle so Tom can continue fighting for New Jerseyans in Congress.

We know that the past two years have been a trying time for everyone. It makes us doubly grateful for all you have done to support Tom and to defend our democracy. We are especially thankful for those in our community who have worked tirelessly to keep us safe during these unprecedented times.

This Thanksgiving is a time to recharge and be in fellowship with our loved ones — and it is with hope that we enter into this time of remembrance and gratitude.

Let us give thanks for those things we have achieved — and continue to strive for progress, together.

Thank you — stay safe,

Team Malinowski

---
|
---

name: Jenna Henry, Keystone Progress
subject: Taking a moment to just be grateful.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www
body:
Dear Friend,

We are thankful.

We are thankful for people, like you, who stood up for democracy this year, who always fight for justice, and who went out and voted for a progressive PA. We are thankful for all of the folks who work with and volunteer for Keystone Progress. I'm grateful for the kindnesses and the victories we've seen in this past year, too.

This week, I'd like to pause to remind myself that we are a country that is built on change. That the work we do makes a huge impact and places us on a path toward building a progressive nation that respects all of its people and their rights.

I hope that you have the time to celebrate the reasons that you are grateful, too. And to embrace a reprieve from the endless, often disheartening news cycle and rat race to recuperate and remember what's important to you. And then next week, with those good thoughts in mind, we’ll get up again and keep fighting for what is right and what is just.

Thank you. Thank you. And thank you for standing with us friend.

Jenna Henry
Keystone Progress

https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/ [https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/]

name: Danielle Allen
subject: Thankful
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE COMMITTEE TO ELECT DANIELLE ALLEN
body:
Hi, Peter Willis.
I hope you’re getting some time to unplug and settle in with your holiday plans. I sure am ready for some sweet potato pie and board games with my family.
Before I head offline, though, I wanted to take a minute to send my profound thanks for the support you’ve shown for my campaign. Tonight, when I sit down at the dinner table with my family and take stock of all that I am thankful for this year, I will be thinking of how grateful I am that you’re in my corner.
Traveling around our Commonwealth -- across our 351 beautiful towns and cities -- has given me the extraordinary opportunity to hear the stories of so many creative, courageous, hard-working people. I am honored and humbled to be entrusted with your dreams and hopes for a reimagined future. I have been inspired. I know, together, we will achieve the promise of One Commonwealth.
Thank you again for your continued support, Peter Willis. I hope you have a wonderful and restful Thanksgiving!
-Danielle

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/da4manov2021?refcode=em_fr_2021.11.18_b1_TA_all&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/da4manov2021?refcode=em_fr_2021.11.18_b1_TA_all&amount=25]
Danielle is a nonprofit leader, policy innovator, educator, and mom. Over the last twenty years, she has led organizations at all scales from local civic education providers to the $6 billion Mellon Foundation. Her leadership is characterized by listening, collaborating, and innovating– as in leading a multi-disciplinary COVID response team that led to the Biden-Harris Pandemic Testing Board and an interstate compact to build out COVID testing resources.

clean_body: Hi, Peter Willis. I hope you’re getting some time to unplug and settle in with your holiday plans. I sure am ready for some sweet potato pie and board games with my family. Before I head offline, though, I wanted to take a minute to send my profound thanks for the support you’ve shown for my campaign. Tonight, when I sit down at the dinner table with my family and take stock of all that I am thankful for this year, I will be thinking of how grateful I am that you’re in my corner. Traveling around our Commonwealth -- across our 351 beautiful towns and cities -- has given me the extraordinary opportunity to hear the stories of so many creative, courageous, hard-working people. I am honored and humbled to be entrusted with your dreams and hopes for a reimagined future. I have been inspired. I know, together, we will achieve the promise of One Commonwealth. Thank you again for your continued support, Peter Willis. I hope you have a wonderful and restful Thanksgiving! -Danielle [] Danielle is a nonprofit leader, policy innovator, educator, and mom. Over the last twenty years, she has led organizations at all scales from local civic education providers to the $6 billion Mellon Foundation. Her leadership is characterized by listening, collaborating, and innovating– as in leading a multi-disciplinary COVID response team that led to the Biden-Harris Pandemic Testing Board and an interstate compact to build out COVID testing resources. name: Kathy Barnette
subject: Happy Thanksgiving
body:
---
| | | | | | |
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001cOklC0LDKabK46J0Ww0k3ZU7tY5wX1p4raPiTodU7BDpbfdcNuj5q7P-jrosdcuRwByAr8B0XuahSR0eNyqSMICx0TqavzUStn-D5dLsMkwIQIqMu3Xtpznh-1HFsb1HXJFpFkmui7mg8PmYDM2U7w==&c=fueskU0w65u7IrI5zpmM5DkzNX8vopM8478dLUFbXOL3mtgxhkF5Tw==&ch=RHX7MNY-zXD7OeZvNMaN3zQ8URhIZ0YzC-27cTtBSziWNeRm0ajedg==)
---
|
---
| Peter,
---
| Today is one of the great American holidays. Today, we give thanks.
Thanksgiving is a wonderful day to take stock of all the blessings that we've inherited as Americans. Only in this beautiful country could we enjoy such freedom and opportunity.
My story, from a pig farm in rural Alabama to running for the United States Senate, could only happen here. The gratitude I feel for this amazing nation is indescribable.
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001cOklC0LDKabK46J0Ww0k3ZU7tY5wX1p4raPiTodU7BDpbfdcNuj5q7P-jrosdcuRwByAr8B0XuahSR0eNyqSMICx0TqavzUStn-D5dLsMkwIQIqMu3Xtpznh-1HFsb1HXJFpFkmui7mg8PmYDM2U7w==&c=fueskU0w65u7IrI5zpmM5DkzNX8vopM8478dLUFbXOL3mtgxhkF5Tw==&ch=RHX7MNY-zXD7OeZvNMaN3zQ8URhIZ0YzC-27cTtBSziWNeRm0ajedg==)
---
| It falls to every generation of Americans to remember and give thanks for all the blessings we have inherited. That's why we take this day every year to sit down with those we love and give thanks.
The American Dream is not yet dead, and as we gather together with our families, let's all take a moment to give thanks for this great land of opportunity and liberty.
So, from my family to yours, and from everybody here at Team Kathy, we wish you a very happy Thanksgiving.

Thanks for all your support,
---
|
---
| Kathy Barnette
---
| | |
---

name: Culp for Congress
subject: Happy Thanksgiving!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CULP FOR CONGRESS**
body:
| | _[View online](https://app.getresponse.com/view.html?x=a62b&m=BQi5xa&mc=rr&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EJsxh9d&)_
---
| | |
---
| | **HAPPY THANKSGIVING FROM OUR FAMILY TO YOURS**
---
| |
**Dear Friend,**
This year marks the 401st anniversary of the pilgrims landing at Plymouth, Massachusetts. In November 1621, Governor William Bradford declared a Day of Thanksgiving and the Pilgrims celebrated with a three-day-long feast.

The harvest had been abundant that year, but later on, the colony's food supply was greatly depleted. Many colonists died that winter from sickness and starvation.

The winter of 1621-1622 reduced their daily ration to five kernels of corn per person. A dire situation, by any standard.

Twelve weeks of drought dried up their crops and by April 1623, they gathered as a group and fasted for eight hours straight and prayed. The next morning they reported that a gentle rain fell on their lands and continued for two weeks. Their crops were saved, and their harvest abundant. They had a surplus of food, which seemed unimaginable just a few weeks prior.

The nation that those pilgrims eventually built would become the most powerful, successful, and prosperous nation in the history of mankind. But it didn't come without sacrifice and toil.

Give thanks this Thanksgiving; I believe the challenges we face as a nation can and will be overcome by perseverance and praise to our Lord.
With the deepest of gratitude for each of you,
**Loren and the entire Culp Family and Culp for Congress Team**
---

name: Friends of Charity Barry
subject: Happy Thanksgiving!
body:
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ApYuCUwJ3Tjy0paNH7Q9IRMoOlhBncEmc5zelYJXklxd5kZMl2YkoE2aapIpoK7PtKazNFHZtA3mdx47_-Jaj6MTRmf6K2AtWAOP1DfF7O2ZGdgxRPMq0V-NxRdM0AKcR3PGQ_7-YSl5bi-QHekKXLg9v7Y9kXSr&c=HdmZ6Hskq1QleIbM6f9hcDQihYccdG1BthKkV3WbCDduUqyUOjM3zg==&ch=BG08DI90v0sk0iWe9niKWWobe8bzDG_8e3Rj2qeJCgv1mSXZmbWh4g==)
---
|
# Happy Thanksgiving
---
| | |
---|---
|
"In the midst of a civil war of unequalled magnitude and severity," President Lincoln proclaimed Thanksgiving a national holiday.

Even at that time in our history, Americans everywhere were grateful for all that the Almighty had bestowed on this land. They were thankful to be Americans!

Now, over a century and a half later, it is easy to look at the state of our country, see everything that has gone wrong in the past year, and feel that we couldn't be more divided.

But we have much to be thankful for!

We are privileged to live in the greatest country on Earth! We enjoy Freedoms and Liberties like no other people. The Lord has had His hand of blessing on this nation, and for that we must be truly grateful!!!

But we have much work to do as stewards of this great land we call home. It is our responsibility to usher unto future generations a better nation. One that continues our great traditions of Freedom and Liberty with which we have been supremely blessed.

As you count your blessings this Thanksgiving, consider contributing some of what you have been given toward the future of our nation...

Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction!

I pray that you have a blessed Thanksgiving with those you hold most dear.

Thank you for your support of my campaign and dedication this great country!

Sincerely,

Charity Barry

name: Sara Jacobs
subject: What I’m thankful for
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
I’m thankful for all of you who have been by my side throughout this past year.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38997150/317961146/-1384613475?refcode=BLU-SJC-20211124-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOGI3M2VhNi0wNjRlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AV2rhHNuVnY5nWKzOkg440jDIsfRPBUKZq4NyhXUuyU=)
---
| Hi,

I wanted to take a moment today to wish you a happy Thanksgiving. We have so much to be thankful for on this special day. I am spending today feeding the troops and giving thanks for their service and commitment to America.

I am thankful for the frontline, essential workers who have kept our country going throughout the coronavirus pandemic. I am thankful for the scientists who developed a vaccine that has made it possible for us to spend today with family and loved ones. And I’m thankful for all of you who have been by my side throughout this past year.

I am grateful for my family and friends, my incredible team, my neighbors and community members, our volunteers and interns and fellows, and everyone in our community for giving me the opportunity to serve. I am thankful for you.

Thank you for believing in a future we can build together.

From my family to yours, happy Thanksgiving.

Warmly,
Sara
---

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: Happy Thanksgiving!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
#
Friend, **Happy Thanksgiving!**
This Thanksgiving day, I want to take a moment to express my deepest gratitude to you and our entire grassroots movement for the unwavering support you’ve shown this campaign.
Since the moment I announced my candidacy to represent you in Congress to the work we’ve done together over the past year — you have been an integral part of this team and I’m so blessed to have you standing beside me.
Growing up, I never thought someone with my background could make it in politics, let alone be elected by my colleagues as the youngest member of House Democratic leadership — but your support has helped us achieve what for a long time seemed impossible.
Despite the many challenges this year — I am incredibly proud that House Democrats have pushed our country forward and continue to fight to enact President Biden’s broadly popular agenda.
Within the last two weeks, we passed the _Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act_ to repair our country’s deteriorating infrastructure and the _Build Back Better Act_ to lower costs for Americans, create millions of good-paying jobs, and stop the climate crisis.
I look forward to the Senate passing the _Build Back Better Act_ and getting it onto President Biden’s desk, so we can get more life-changing relief out to the American people.
Thank you again for committing to fight alongside me, and I hope that you’re healthy and safe this holiday.
Best,
Mondaire

subject: I am grateful for you this Thanksgiving
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Oklahomans for Madison
body:
| Happy Thanksgiving!

Today is a day to reflect on what we’re thankful for in our lives. Every day of this campaign for U.S. Senate, I am overwhelmed by the support we’ve gotten from people all across the state of Oklahoma and nationwide since we launched just about one month ago.

So from the bottom of my heart, thank you!

As we look ahead over the next few months, our campaign is facing a lot. We have to start the hard work of grassroots organizing statewide, launching ads, and building up our momentum from the ground up.

**It will be hard, but because of supporters like you, I know we will get there.**

I hope you have a fantastic Thanksgiving with family and friends.

Thank you for all you do,
Madison

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39006656/317964452/-766995749?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzBlMjFiZS0wODRlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j3TJC4on6bXkGwh1ZkCFWEgpaew6BeTkwJnvfnuKBb4=&emci=5f333543-994c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=dc0e21be-084e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=15639879)

Hi friends, Happy Thanksgiving!

I wanted to take some time to drop a quick note and wish you and your family a wonderful holiday today.

Thanksgiving is one of my favorite times of the year. This season is about family, gratitude, and saying thanks. This year I have so much to be thankful for: my loving family, my wonderful friends, but most especially, I give thanks to you, my supporters.

This year had its challenging moments, but your support has shown me that we can achieve great things when working towards change and transformation. So I hope as we enter 2022, we hold on to what's important and continue to fight the good fight.

This Thanksgiving, I will be traveling to South Carolina to be with my extended family. My family is so important to me, and after a year of isolation, I am particularly grateful to be reunited with them in person! I cherish these moments with them because I know that wherever we go in the world, we will always find each other.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39006658/317964453/-1564706288?refcode=em21_111125_thanksgiving&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzBlMjFiZS0wODRlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j3TJC4on6bXkGwh1ZkCFWEgpaew6BeTkwJnvfnuKBb4=)
---

Thank you for being part of the team. I wish you and your loved ones a healthy and safe Thanksgiving weekend.

\-- Ann Roe

name: Team Nelson
subject: We deserve our fair share of pie
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nelson for Wisconsin**
body:
---
| | Folks,

This Thanksgiving, like many, families are struggling to make ends meet as they’re spending money at the pump, the grocery store, and more. This is because billionaires and corporations have created an unfair, unequal economic playing field.

**While they gobble up all the profits, the majority of America is left with scraps.**

[Watch “Tough Turkey Talk with Tom” below where he uses Thanksgiving dinner to explain the urgent need for change in our current political system:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39007423/317966212/-1833339684?refcode=TN_EM_EN_1MO_211125_1_1&refcode2=f8974173-094e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODk3NDE3My0wOTRlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eN1K7QA7P3mdtERfsbaA9S-DxOcimJ5pXlJG0ypXBxQ=&emci=371b304d-4b4d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=f8974173-094e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=15112925)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39007424/317966213/-1833339684?refcode=TN_EM_EN_1MO_211125_1_1&refcode2=f8974173-094e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODk3NDE3My0wOTRlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eN1K7QA7P3mdtERfsbaA9S-DxOcimJ5pXlJG0ypXBxQ=&emci=371b304d-4b4d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=f8974173-094e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=15112925)
When Tom is elected, we can promise he will fight like heck to give working American families **their fair share.**

Have a happy and healthy Thanksgiving,

Team Nelson

name: Mike Collier
subject: Happy Thanksgiving!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Collier Committee
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/89772/images/Logo%20%282%29.png]
Hey folks,

No fundraising requests today. No campaign event invites. Just taking a moment to give thanks.

It’s been a hectic couple months since officially launching this campaign. Last week, while barnstorming, we officially hit 5,000 miles on the road! So I find days like today particularly restorative — a chance to sit down and reflect on what I’m most thankful for as 2021 comes to a close:

Today, I’m thankful for all those who answer the call to serve. That includes our first responders, servicemembers, veterans, and military families who sacrifice so much to protect this country. It also includes those who serve in our communities, in education, in our hospitals, through non-profits and works of faith, to name a few.

I’m grateful for our beloved Texas and the values it represents: family, freedom, and hard work. We are far from perfect. But I’m grateful for the energy I see around me every day, as we work to do what's right — to protect our rights, to keep the lights on, to educate our children. When we work together, I’m confident in our ability to bring about the change we seek.

And of course, I’m thankful for folks like you reading this message. Whether you’ve met us out on the road, chipped in a few dollars, followed our campaign on social media, or reached out with a word of encouragement, your support means so much to me. It keeps me going — even on long days.

I’m so excited about the opportunity ahead of us in 2022, and looking forward to working together to put this seat back to work for all of us.

But for now, whatever traditions you may have, I hope it’s a special day filled with delicious food and quality time with those you love.

Thanks, y’all, as always, for all you do.

Talk soon,
Mike
The Collier Committee
P.O. Box 14648
Humble, TX 77347
United States
[https://collierfortexas.com/] |
Paid for by the Collier Committee
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We believe that emails are the best way to connect with our supporters and keep you up-to-date. However, if you’d still like to receive fewer emails, fill out this form here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/2abP63YYcUqXP5eHRkxWIQ2]. If you wish to no longer receive these messages, please unsubscribe. [https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/40aeeb3a-d94b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8/2f6aa26c-094e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTc3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjZhYTI2Yy0wOTRlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5HnYUN-R_5IrbfyLEIDcZgoFZC3AfRD5WlfVIwqeoqc=&id=109059170]

name: The Russell Family
subject: Showing Thanks
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KEN RUSSELL FOR FLORIDA
body:
Happy Turkey Day, Everyone!
We just wanted to send a message of gratitude from our family to yours on this very special Thanksgiving. We hope you have a fantastic Thanksgiving holiday filled with all the good things life has to offer; friends, family, and great food! Our family loves to celebrate by visiting our local senior centers and making sure that our most precious generation knows they’re cared for during the holiday season.
We hope you are able to get outside with the ones you love today and experience the beauty of our great state. That is definitely one of the things we are most grateful for today and every day!
Have a very Happy Thanksgiving!
The Russell Family

name: ICYMI News
subject: A false narrative
body:
Have you read about President Biden’s Ambassador to the United Nations? She is telling her fellow ambassadors from around
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zg6ftos4achq7bmv9ru31a8on67tco2jp3k48i1o_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c3im6o31c1h2bs) Dear Fellow American, Have you read about President Biden’s Ambassador to the United Nations? She is telling her fellow ambassadors from around the world that “white supremacy” is “weaved into [America’s] founding documents and principles.” Can you imagine being told that America’s glorious founding principle—the principle that “all men are created equal,” endowed by God with “unalienable rights”—embodies the idea of white supremacy? Can you imagine being told the same thing about our cherished **Constitution** , which is responsible for America becoming the freest, most prosperous nation in human history? That America’s United Nations Ambassador is promoting these lies is reprehensible. But even more reprehensible is the fact that so many K-12 and college students in America are being taught this same false narrative. Too many young Americans are not learning what makes America an exceptional nation and a beacon of liberty for the world. Instead, they learn that our great nation’s history is essentially a history of injustice—that America at its heart has **always** been racist and is undeserving of respect. Is it any wonder that so many younger Americans today feel an increasing attraction to so-called “critical race theory” and other ideas destructive of liberty? Is it any wonder that there is decreasing support among younger Americans for basic liberties that past generations have revered and taken for granted—liberties such as freedom of speech? It is easy to become discouraged by the Left’s dominance in our colleges and universities and its increasing influence in K-12 education. But we must not lose hope—we must fight back with the truth. **Hillsdale College has been engaging the Left on the battlefield of education from the beginning.** In fact, we produced a free online course that helps do just that, titled **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope.”** And I’m asking for your help in promoting it to additional millions of Americans—especially younger Americans—and to expand our other critical outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide. You can help fund the promotion of this important course at this secure link: _**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z68h7grufj83nsk2o1strifu27lcsssgsk7lsbp8_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c3im6o31c1h2bs)**_ [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zge3bdgk8q0676llmonee6kk4um63q4pcfc78kh8_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c3im6o31c1h2bs) Historian and Hillsdale professor Wilfred McClay teaches the course based on his published history of America. **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** presents a full, unbiased account of America’s past. Our goal in producing and promoting this free online course is to **restore the kind of intelligent patriotism—especially among our young people—that is essential to preserving free government.** This work is the surest means of defending liberty—which is why we make every online course available **free of charge** to any citizen wishing to learn. **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** is a powerful counterweight to _The New York Times_ ’ “1619 Project,” which seeks to inject the idea that America is essentially unjust into the curricula of America’s K-12 schools. Of course, producing an online course and making it available free of charge requires significant resources—and promoting the course nationwide, which is essential, costs even more. To date, more than 118,000 Americans have enrolled in **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** —but we must do more. Your support is critical to our success. As you may know, Hillsdale refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student loans and grants. That’s why we can remain true to our mission on behalf of liberty, free of so many bureaucratic regulations that burden other colleges and universities. This independence also means that all of our work is entirely dependent on the support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. This is especially true of our national outreach efforts, including free online courses. **Can I count on you today to help fund the promotion of “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope” to millions of Americans nationwide and expand our other educational outreach efforts with a generous tax-deductible gift of $100 or more?** Please make your best tax-deductible gift using this secure link: _**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2uhr22njsbn13mtkpi7i3e006i1obfs2qkahel8_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c3im6o31c1h2bs)**_ We deeply appreciate your partnership in promoting the kind of intelligent patriotism—especially among younger Americans—that is essential to preserving free government. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 **P.S.** For a gift of $100 or more, we’ll send you our online course, **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope,” in a handsome DVD box set. The course explores America’s history as a land of hope founded on high principles** and counters the far-Left’s false narrative about our country. Thank you so much for helping us promote intelligent patriotism—especially among younger Americans. _**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zqrpqjhbftigkqu52fk259ka7qkprlvia7sq5ag0_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c3im6o31c1h2bs)**_
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[Click here to change your subscription preferences](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z0k97m61ktgmhudodvv2ndidsbu0ofvdb2oapk38_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9jle8r7ccjkm1on9dtjmppq9dhkumqb7d9neppqcdtlmuju1df34kqu2c3neior3d5medjm05plmgqb3ct66uqr69bls2on2s3isujqact4moqfbd5jmkrncst66uqrf8pnm9qrf9bjmpqn4djm69qb0sbkmuprf972u9hfcpbjcip72s3lm1o75d3mc4q61p36cljj8s76mkqj1o5nm1j7eo72mli3csj3csp238h1e8he4933cpjm1pb3c1gm0oh5u)

subject: Wish President Trump and Melania a Happy Thanksgiving
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Sign the special Thanksgiving Card for President Trump and Melania. We bet President Trump would love that
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zv9pjc33e1viuc0023ekeg8ad35p2pd09fne8a4o_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c3im6p34c5h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65thgsop3appje9i6cdb3m4qe1c5ledpn5dr6m9i7ed356mrbepbge4ob9ddiearjfkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1pbephmciqr6o3mc5j3ao5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)

Friend,

Did you miss it?

**Thanksgiving is HERE and we are making President Trump and former First Lady Melania a _special_ Thanksgiving Card signed by America First Patriots, like YOU.**

[** SIGN TRUMP’S CARD NOW >> **](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zp4224hshn920glr9d2el41oqri4ulksgh2fee20_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c3im6p34c5h2bs)

[** SIGN TRUMP’S CARD NOW >> **](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zuupkbdks348cqgieo0sogi3mm0hdgs1qnaf9tfg_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c3im6p34c5h2bs)

[** SIGN TRUMP’S CARD NOW >> **](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z95mg0aqv3ntsn6d0f9r4r1ak8nt1do50i95c36o_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c3im6p34c5h2bs)

We saw your name wasn’t on President Trump and Melania’s Thanksgiving Card and we know you are one of their TOP Patriots, so we thought we would reach out one more time.

**[Please add your name IMMEDIATELY to wish President Trump and Melania a Happy Thanksgiving. >>](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zcufmdk109uj9fpj235fputmk7kjonqale55kt08_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c3im6p34c5h2bs)**

[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z6bl9sj3tciej0871df3rggi3qdm9npo4m1a026g_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c3im6p34c5h2bs)

** President Trump and former First Lady Melania did so much for our great Country, and we think they’d love to hear from the American people. **

Our team set a goal of getting **500,000 signatures from Trump Patriots** , like YOU. Can we count on seeing YOUR name?

**[_Add your name AS SOON AS POSSIBLE to wish President Trump and Melania a Happy Thanksgiving._](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zk1nns3783ba1jdalr3n4muuum6tnful0ttf840o_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c3im6p34c5h2bs)**

Thank you,

NRSC Team

body:
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/39009628/317971106/765663662?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjg5YzE2NS0wYjRlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1GRM-DcToh_5VzJjbiqorQU-YXlZ_HJwDyd7Scro34s=&emci=b99fd3f5-474d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=ff89c165-0b4e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=561582) | Dear friend, On this Thanksgiving holiday — from all of us here at The Fairness Project — we wanted to say thank you for your dedication and continued support. **You have helped us to accomplish some pretty amazing things this year, and for that, we are so grateful. ** Supporters like you helped us pass 3 new ballot measures, bringing our winning track record to 23 out of 24 campaigns and bringing higher wages and police reform to residents in Arizona, Texas, and Ohio. Your support also helped us to launch our new Ballot Measure Rescue Campaign to fight back against attacks on voting access and the ballot box, which will be critical to our 2022 efforts. As the new year rapidly approaches, we’re ready for the many battles ahead to pass meaningful change and defend the ballot measure process — and friend, we’re so grateful to have you in the fight for social and economic justice with us. Until then, have a safe and happy holiday with your loved ones, — The Fairness Project
---

We love ya.

| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/39009791/317971933/1300596418?211125_thxgiving_cltv_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjlkZjM1NTE0LTBjNGUtZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=GzjECmc2DggZhGJynTJQmhZmRGZJrseeVqz3BmpKMyY=) [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/39009792/317971934/1300596418?211125_thxgiving_cltv_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjlkZjM1NTE0LTBjNGUtZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=GzjECmc2DggZhGJynTJQmhZmRGZJrseeVqz3BmpKMyY=)
---
**Happy Thanksgiving!** We hope you are able to take some time off today to decompress, spend time with your loved ones, or do whatever helps you practice gratitude and self care today.

This is our first Thanksgiving as a community here at Barrier To Entry, and we have so much to be grateful for— specifically, all the people in this community that have come together around this cause.

Thank you to our friends and family who helped us get this organization off the ground with $25, $50, and $100 donations. Thank you to every person who has listened to us talk about these issues on Zooms and in fundraising emails and over the dinner table. Thank you for not turning away and for being supportive any way you can. Thank you to our friends and supporters and mentors who have volunteered their talents and time to support this work in one way or another, and to all those who have provided us important feedback and guidance.

This work is making a difference, and you’re the fuel that keeps us going. With you, we will break down barriers and work to achieve an inclusive government that represents ALL.

We’re grateful for our supporters for being on this journey with us and we’re grateful for our candidates who fight for their communities every single day.

Please enjoy your holiday, and thank you for supporting the work we do.

******With gratitude,******
******_Eden, Megan, Jimena & Annie_**
The gals @ Barrier To Entry PAC****
* * *

**BARRIER TO ENTRY PAC supports candidates and campaign staff from working class backgrounds as they carve their paths in the Democratic political space. We provide direct cash assistance for essential items like phones, cars, laptops, and living stipends -- which often times, these candidates and their campaigns don't have access to. clean_body: We love ya. | | | = = Happy Thanksgiving! We hope you are able to take some time off today to decompress, spend time with your loved ones, or do whatever helps you practice gratitude and self care today. This is our first Thanksgiving as a community here at Barrier To Entry, and we have so much to be grateful for— specifically, all the people in this community that have come together around this cause. Thank you to our friends and family who helped us get this organization off the ground with $25, $50, and $100 donations. Thank you to every person who has listened to us talk about these issues on Zooms and in fundraising emails and over the dinner table. Thank you for not turning away and for being supportive any way you can. Thank you to our friends and supporters and mentors who have volunteered their talents and time to support this work in one way or another, and to all those who have provided us important feedback and guidance. This work is making a difference, and you’re the fuel that keeps us going. With you, we will break down barriers and work to achieve an inclusive government that represents ALL. We’re grateful for our supporters for being on this journey with us and we’re grateful for our candidates who fight for their communities every single day. Please enjoy your holiday, and thank you for supporting the work we do. ****With gratitude,** **Eden, Megan, Jimena & Annie The gals @ Barrier To Entry PAC** ********************** ******************** **************************EXPRESS DONATE to Barrier to Entry PAC************************** **************************If you've stored payment info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:************************** | **************************= "="************************** | **************************= "="************************** | **************************= "="************************** | **************************= "="************************** ---|---|---|--- BARRIER TO ENTRY PAC supports candidates and campaign staff from working class backgrounds as they carve their paths in the Democratic political space. name: Charlie Crist
subject: Last year, so many of us spent our Thanksgiving a little differently
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
But this year we give thanks that we can safely spend it with our loved ones. |
---

| | |
---
Friend,

Last year, so many of us spent our Thanksgiving like we never had before -- without our friends, families, and loved ones at the dinner table, giving thanks over Zoom or carving turkey over FaceTime. And while we may have been separated by state borders, buffering video calls, or the sterile walls of a hospital room, our loved ones were never far from our hearts.

This year, thanks to President Biden's vaccine roll-out and the hard work of our healthcare heroes, we give thanks that Thanksgiving will once again be spent safely with those we love most.

Today, I am grateful that my youngest nieces and nephews can finally get vaccinated and our Thanksgiving Kids' Table will again be full with their smiling faces and laughter.

I'm grateful for the health and happiness of Floridians, for our health care and essential workers, and for the vaccinations that made this holiday possible.

I am grateful for our beautiful Sunshine State and for all of the blessings to come next year.

Wishing you a happy and blessed Thanksgiving!

Charlie

---

| Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
---
Charlie Crist for Governor
P.O. Box 1547
St. Petersburg, FL 33731
United States

name: Stewart Navarre
subject: Happy Thanksgiving
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEWART NAVARRE FOR CONGRESS
body:
Folks,
I wanted to take a quick moment to wish you a Happy Thanksgiving!
Yana and I hope you have a wonderful day celebrating with the people you love.
I wish you a happy holiday filled with good food, good friends, and family. There are so many things we can be thankful for, none more so than the opportunity to celebrate in-person once again!
Enjoy your holiday!
Stewart Navarre

name: Holly McCormack
subject: Happy Thanksgiving!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Holly for Congress
body:
https://www.holly4congress.com/ [https://www.holly4congress.com/]
Peter,
I’m writing today to share my deepest appreciation for all of our nation’s veterans. Growing up on army bases and in a family full of veterans, I learned discipline very early on and that service is meant to be selfless.
Today, we want to honor members of the Armed Forces that have defended our nation’s freedom and protected our country's future.
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88943/images/Image%20from%20iOS%20%2851%29.jpg]Today also reminds us that we must do more to protect our veterans when they re-enter civilian life. After returning home many veterans are not given adequate support. GA-14 has a considerable veteran population yet we only have one VA hospital in the district and no veterans’ cemeteries . We must do better. We will do better. That's why I'm running to change the way that we treat our veterans when they return home.
We owe a debt to those who’ve placed their lives on the line to protect our freedom as Americans, and we have to do better to provide for their care and to honor their sacrifices.
Sincerely,
Holly McCormack.

name: Nina Turner
subject: Grateful for you, Team!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina Turner for Us
body:
We can’t do this without you.
#

Happy Thanksgiving, Friends!

As we gather on Thanksgiving, it is undeniable how trying this year has been for so many families.

In the midst of this pandemic we are thinking of those who are facing this holiday without a special loved one for the very first time, those who may even miss their family meal because they are going to work on this special day to make ends meet, and the millions of people who are battling poverty and struggling to survive.

With the numerous challenges of Covid, it is undeniable how your help fuels the Progressive Movement to lift workers and their families.

So I want to express my gratitude because without you in this righteous fight, none of our work would be possible.

YOU are the reason we are having an impact on improving the quality of life and living conditions for the poor, working poor, and barely middle class.

YOU are the reason our demands for Medicare for All, a living wage, and quality education are being amplified.

YOU are the reason we have been able to organize like-minded people across the country and build a multiracial, multigenerational movement that is advocating for an equitable, inclusive, and just society.

YOU have had the courage to ask for more. And for YOU, I am truly grateful today.
With gratitude,
Nina Turner

* * *
Paid for by Nina Turner for Us
---

PO Box 91956
Cleveland, OH 44101
United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Susie Lee
subject: Happy Thanksgiving!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susie Lee for Congress
body:
Happy Thanksgiving from Susie Lee!

Folks —

From my family to yours, we’re wishing you a very happy Thanksgiving!

This year has reminded us just how important our strength, health, and being close to the ones we love really is.

Today, it’s important that we take stock of what we’re most thankful for. For me, I’m thankful for the love and support of my family. I’m also grateful to folks across NV-03 for continuing to place their confidence in me to represent them in Congress.

I hope your Thanksgiving is restful and that you’re able to gather — in person or virtually — with the ones closest to you.

With gratitude,

Susie Lee

I'm thankful that you have stood in my corner and are with me 100% in bringing about all the positive change that we're going to see for our communities, our safety, and our prosperity by winning the 2022 Governor's race.
We are going to take back our state next year, and deliver a victory that we all can be thankful for!
Once again, Happy Thanksgiving!
-Sheriff Joe Lombardo
