name: Letitia James
subject: Here’s why I’m thankful for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY
body:
| | |
---
Happy Thanksgiving, Peter!

I wanted to take a moment to express my absolute gratitude for supporters like you, who have made it possible for me to fight for a better New York. Since the official launch of my gubernatorial campaign last month, the outpouring of support that I have received has been beyond my wildest expectations.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39010187/317975544/-256834629?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk211-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOGNjOTgxYi0xMTRlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iT6AH3a4CLOahQopmmplw_fIfk_ZwOiNNuM-uZ6Kjp8=)
I’m so honored that you have chosen to join me in the fight against climate change, economic and racial inequality, and the influence of the ultra-wealthy on our democratic system. In return for your support, I vow to defend ___every_ community and region of New York.

So, Peter, I hope you enjoy the holiday with your family and friends. You can rest assured that I will continue to fight for _every person_ at your Thanksgiving dinner table, today and every day after that.

Thank you for choosing me to fight for you and your loved ones,
Letitia James
| | With the first month of my campaign behind us, it’s crucial that we don’t lose momentum. **Will you make a contribution now to support my continued work to fight for the vulnerable?**

name: Josh Riley
subject: Wishing you and your family a Happy Thanksgiving
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Riley for Congress
body:
Happy Thanksgiving! I’m so grateful for friends, family, and this incredible grassroots team.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39010409/317976738/459115770?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlM2NmMzk3ZS0xMTRlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OjP67msJMtPayMA_j8SZBkc3WznDhfGnFWHWPNnCWVw=&emci=70f79ca6-624d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=e3cf397e-114e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=4588596)
---
Peter,

**Happy Thanksgiving!** I’m so grateful for friends, family, and this incredible grassroots team.

Whether you read my emails, contribute to our campaign, or simply offer encouragement—I want to express my sincerest thanks for your support.

Because of you, we are building a lasting movement to create new jobs, revitalize the economy, and strengthen the Middle Class.

I am hopeful about our future, and I couldn’t ask for a better team to share this journey with.

I hope you enjoy your day with loved ones! From my family to yours—Happy Thanksgiving.

With gratitude,

Josh Riley

* * *

I’m so grateful for friends, family, and this incredible grassroots team. Whether you read my emails, contribute to our campaign, or simply offer encouragement—I want to express my sincerest thanks for your support. I am hopeful about our future, and I couldn’t ask for a better team to share this journey with. I hope you enjoy your day with loved ones! From my family to yours—Happy Thanksgiving. body:

Happy Thanksgiving, friend!
I hope that you're having a joyous start to the holiday season and are able to celebrate safely with your loved ones today.
Looking back, 2021 has been a whirlwind of a year, and I've been working to protect our democracy, defend reproductive freedom, tackle the COVID-19 pandemic, keep Americans safe, and much, much more.
**On this day of gratitude, I want to thank you for being by my side, friend. **I can't help but think about the _astounding_ amount of progress we've made together as we've built up our people-powered movement to flip Florida blue.
None of this work would have been possible without dedicated grassroots supporters like you, who stick by me through thick and thin. I don't take your trust in me lightly, and I couldn't be more grateful for your support, friend.
From the bottom of my heart, thank you for believing in this movement. My family and I wish you a very happy Thanksgiving.
Sincerely,

Congresswoman Val Demings
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Happy Thanksgiving!
body: [INSIDE JW] Happy Thanksgiving! Each year I like to remind our supporters to recall what life was like for the Pilgrims who arrived on these shores in December of 1620. As the Plimoth Plantation [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57220&L=11088&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucGxpbW90aC5vcmcvbGVhcm4vanVzdC1raWRzL2hvbWV3b3JrLWhlbHAvd2hvLXdlcmUtcGlsZ3JpbXM/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=] describes: Many of the colonists fell ill. They were probably suffering from scurvy and pneumonia caused by a lack of shelter in the cold, wet weather. Although the Pilgrims were not starving, their sea-diet was very high in salt, which weakened their bodies on the long journey and during that first winter. As many as two or three people died each day during their first two months on land. Only 52 people survived the first year in Plymouth. When Mayflower left Plymouth on April 5, 1621, she was sailed back to England by only half of her crew. Nevertheless, a year after their arrival they sat down for a feast of thanksgiving. They had befriended and made a treaty of mutual protection with the Pokanoket Wampanoag leader, Ousamequin, also known as Massasoit to the Pilgrims. In the fall of 1621, the colonists marked their first harvest with a three-day celebration. Massasoit and 90 of his men joined the English for feasting and entertainment. In the 1800s this famous celebration became the basis for the story of the First Thanksgiving. It would be easy to focus on the passing difficulties of our time, especially for those of us who fight daily to preserve the God-given liberties that have blessed this land since the time of the Pilgrims. But, as they did, we must pause to reflect on all that is good and on the Source of this goodness. And as President Washington reminded Americans in his 1789 first Thanksgiving Proclamation [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57220&L=21332&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9mb3VuZGVycy5hcmNoaXZlcy5nb3YvZG9jdW1lbnRzL1dhc2hpbmd0b24vMDUtMDQtMDItMDA5MT91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==], we must also pray for good, constitutional government: ...beseech him to pardon our national and other transgressions—to enable us all, whether in public or private stations, to perform our several and relative duties properly and punctually—to render our national government a blessing to all the people, by constantly being a Government of wise, just, and constitutional laws, discreetly and faithfully executed and obeyed... As I reflect on this I am particularly thankful for all of you who donate to support our just cause [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57220&L=12711&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS05ODYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz] and for your many messages of encouragement you send to me and my hard working Judicial Watch colleagues who, in “private stations,” work for a “wise, just, and constitutional” government. We will continue to fight for the truth and transparency, shed light into the darkness and be a small beacon of hope for you and of other patriots our great nation. Thank you for your continued support [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57220&L=2347&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL21ha2UtYS1jb250cmlidXRpb24tMi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=] and, on behalf of all of us at Judicial Watch, I wish you and yours a most blessed Thanksgiving and Christmas season! Until next week, [Contribute] [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57220&L=2347&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL21ha2UtYS1jb250cmlidXRpb24tMi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=] [32x32x1] [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57220&L=13&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZmFjZWJvb2suY29tL0p1ZGljaWFsV2F0Y2gvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz] [32x32x2] [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57220&L=14&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly90d2l0dGVyLmNvbS9qdWRpY2lhbHdhdGNoP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz] [32x32x3] [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57220&L=15&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vdXNlci9KdWRpY2lhbFdhdGNoP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz] [32x32x3] [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57220&L=1285&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaW5zdGFncmFtLmNvbS9qdWRpY2lhbHdhdGNoLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==] Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800 Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 © 2017 - 2021, All Rights Reserved Manage Email Subscriptions [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57220&L=885&F=T&drurl=aHR0cDovL21lbWJlcnMuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz] | Unsubscribe [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/unsubscribe.php?M=27089954&C=eea98a79fb2fad93cccd0bd228df4000&E=dpwillis67%2540gmail.com&L=38&N=57220&AGENCY=jw] View in browser [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?&L=1&M=27089954&N=57220&AGENCY=jw&drurl=ZGlzcGxheS5waHA/TT0yNzA4OTk1NCZDPWVlYTk4YTc5ZmIyZmFkOTNjY2NkMGJkMjI4ZGY0MDAwJkU9ZHB3aWxsaXM2NyUyNTQwZ21haWwuY29tJkw9MzgmTj0xNDEzMCZTPTU3MjIwJkFHRU5DWT1qdyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==]

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: The sublimest gratitude
body:
Yesterday, I wrote to you about the definition of “education” and how it changed from the 1828 version of Webster’s Dictionary to the modern online Merriam-Webster’s definition. In honor of Thanksgiving, I thought it would be interesting to compare the definitions of the word gratitude. You won’t be surprised at the difference, I am sure. **In 1828, Webster’s Dictionary defined gratitude as -** An emotion of the heart, excited by a favor or benefit received; a sentiment of kindness or good will towards a benefactor; thankfulness. _gratitude_ is an agreeable emotion, consisting in or accompanied with good will to a benefactor, and a disposition to make a suitable return of benefits or services, or when no return can be made, with a desire to see the benefactor prosperous and happy. _gratitude_ is a virtue of the highest excellence, as it implies a feeling and generous heart, and a proper sense of duty. The love of God is the sublimest _gratitude_ **In 2021, Merriam-Webster.com defines gratitude as –** the state of being grateful Very different, right? On this Thanksgiving Day, 2021, on behalf of the entire Tea Party Patriots Action support team, I would like to express our deepest gratitude – _the 1828 definition_ – for your commitment to our nation and to our Constitution. Without you, America would most certainly be lost. Happy Thanksgiving to you and your family, and may God Bless America. Jenny Beth Martin + the rest of the team _Oh, give thanks to the Lord, for He is good! For His mercy endures forever._ (Psalm 118:29, NKJV) | |

subject: Happy Thanksgiving!
body:
Today, we celebrate one of the most important traditions in America: Thanksgiving... |
---
| | [ ](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=2632fec3e1&e=c2296cffff)
---
| | Dear Friend, Today, we celebrate one of the most beloved traditions in America: Thanksgiving! On this day, we express our gratitude for our numerous blessings as we cherish and celebrate with family and friends. Holidays like these remind us what is the most important part of our lives - the people we love the most. ****
---
| [ ](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=a294a1c6fe&e=c2296cffff)
---
| I am so thankful to be an American and today I am giving thanks for the many opportunities and rights we enjoy by living in this great nation. It is my prayer that we will always cherish and hold true to the beliefs and values that made America so great. God bless, and have a wonderful day with your family and friends.
**Happy Thanksgiving,**

_Amanda Makki_

What are you grateful for this year? | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39011100/317981351/1561815853?refcode=ea.9c6e6582-194e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ms=ea.9c6e6582-194e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzZlNjU4Mi0xOTRlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vgsibonRHzo-a5t9Y3xIR2Z2JcUX1ug4eDT_Dl-5d5U=&emci=688087fc-9f4c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=9c6e6582-194e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=12666102) Happy Thanksgiving, Peter!

This Thanksgiving I’m grateful for my family, my health, and my loved ones.

And I’m incredibly grateful for the opportunity you have given me. When my parents immigrated to Colorado from a small town in Mexico, I don’t think they could have ever imagined their oldest kid would one day be running to be the first Latina ever elected to the United States Congress from Colorado.

In honor of Thanksgiving, I want to say thank you for helping me get to this point and for your continued support. I can’t wait to see what we accomplish together.

With gratitude,

Dr. Yadira Caraveo

name: Greg Lopez for Governor
subject: Join Me in Giving Thanks
body:
Gratitude is Medicine to Hate and Prejudice
| | | |
---
---
The first Thanksgiving Day in what we know today as American, happened in 1621, one year after the Mayflower brought the pilgrims to Plymouth Rock.
Both the pilgrims and their neighbors, the Native Americans, came together to celebrate their partnership in a successful corn harvest in both gratitude and friendship.
And today, like many generations before us, we once again recognize Thanksgiving Day as the day to give thanks to our Lord for the blessing he has bestowed on us and our country.
I know that across Colorado today, just as in 1621, families of every ethnicity and race are coming together and setting at the same table together in both gratitude and friendship.
We must ignore the noise that America is unwelcoming, uncaring, or has racism flowing through her veins. That narrative is both unfounded and harmful to our families, to our neighbors' families, and our communities.
We must continue to water the Tree of Liberty which grows from the seeds of a free society, a free people, and a brotherhood of freedom for all people regardless of race or ethnicity.
We are a nation of free men and women!
So let us follow the example of humility and love that was displayed by the first pilgrims who opened their hearts, minds, and homes to a people different than their own.
Let us continue to embrace the spirit of kinship and continue our journey to become one people, one nation under God, with liberty and justice for all.
I will never allow the memories of these magnificent men and women to be lost to an agenda of hate and prejudice.
I will protect their legacy and ours as the next governor of Colorado.
---
|
---

name: Tom =?utf-8?b?T+KAmUhhbGxlcmFu?=
subject: Happy Thanksgiving!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
body:
Hope yours is filled with family, friends, and food.
Hey friends, I wanted to take this time to wish you and your family a happy Thanksgiving. I also wanted to say Happy Native American Heritage Day to the Native communities here in Arizona. I am looking forward to spending time with family this Thanksgiving, and I hope that you are able to spend time with yours, too. This is a good time to reflect on the year we have had, and this Thanksgiving, I am filled with gratitude for the hardworking people on my campaign team who are doing all that they can to make sure that we succeed. I am also grateful for sweet potato casserole with extra marshmallows. I also want to thank you, our grassroots supporters. Without your commitment and generosity throughout this year, we wouldn’t have been able to build such a strong campaign so quickly. You give me hope for the future, and I am so grateful for you. Thank you, Tom O’Halleran

clean_body: Hope yours is filled with family, friends, and food. Hey friends, I wanted to take this time to wish you and your family a happy Thanksgiving. I also wanted to say Happy Native American Heritage Day to the Native communities here in Arizona. I am looking forward to spending time with family this Thanksgiving, and I hope that you are able to spend time with yours, too. This is a good time to reflect on the year we have had, and this Thanksgiving, I am filled with gratitude for the hardworking people on my campaign team who are doing all that they can to make sure that we succeed. I am also grateful for sweet potato casserole with extra marshmallows. I also want to thank you, our grassroots supporters. Without your commitment and generosity throughout this year, we wouldn’t have been able to build such a strong campaign so quickly. You give me hope for the future, and I am so grateful for you. Thank you, Tom O’Halleran | | Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress Tom O'Halleran, PO Box 63992, Phoenix, AZ 85082

name: =?utf-8?Q?Charles=20Evans?=
subject: Gratitude
body:
Giving Thanks.

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/charlesevansforcongress2022/big-announcement-8646673?e=5c88a5190b)

**
------------------------------------------------------------

Peter,

However you spend this Thanksgiving Day, I hope you have a wonderful and safe holiday. For many people, today is a time to come together and share blessings with one another.

In that spirit, I want to take a moment to express my deep gratitude to my family, neighbors, colleagues, and friends. More importantly, I’m so grateful to the voters across Cumberland County who put their faith in me for the past three elections and elected me to serve on the Board of Commissioners.

I’ve learned a lot during my time as an elected official. But the thing I’ve learned most is that if we focus on what we share in common, we can come together and create a community where everyone belongs.

I’m filled with so much gratitude today. I hope you have a wonderful holiday with those you love.

Sincerely,

Charles Evans

============================================================
Charles Evans is running for Congress in the new 4th district that includes Cumberland, Harnett, Johnston, Sampson & Wayne counties. Charles is all about second chances and committed to helping those who are less fortunate. He experienced homelessness and battled with addiction and credits his faith for overcoming both. He is the Executive Director of Life Worth Living - Project Fresh Start and involved with various civic and professional associations including serving as a member of the Cape Fear Valley Hospital System Board of Trustees, American Legion Post 202, Men’s Democratic Club, and Order of the Elks. Charles was first elected to the Cumberland County Board of Commissioners as an at-large representative in 2010 - his current term expires in 2022. He served two terms on the Fayetteville City Council from 2005-2009.

You can learn more at ** www.charlesevansforcongress2022.com (https://charlesevansforcongress2022.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ba7b19ef75bed8e6ab352c090&id=31ee60d0a6&e=5c88a5190b)

Our mailing address is:
Evans for Congress | PO Box 52 | Fayetteville, NC 28302
Contact us at: ** info@charlesevansforcongress2022.com (mailto:info@charlesevansforcongress2022.com)

You can change how you receive these emails: ** update your preferences (https://charlesevansforcongress2022.us5.list-manage.com/profile?u=ba7b19ef75bed8e6ab352c090&id=584eded014&e=5c88a5190b&c=fac914cf96)

name: Gwen Moore
subject: The glory of giving
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Gwen Moore for Congress
body:
Thankful for you My Sisters and Brothers, First and foremost, I want you to know that I am most grateful for your support of me and my efforts to represent you in the United States Congress. You gave me this opportunity and I thank you for this privilege. This year has been unprecedented in the amount of fighting and stalling techniques we have had to endure from Trump’s GOP. They have gone to every length possible to prevent the passage of common-sense laws. I know you deserve better. I fight every day to make sure that you and your families’ voices are heard and to ensure the country is not held hostage by the extremist, right-wing, damaging GOP agenda. Your support is what keeps me in Washington, DC, and it is a blessing to be able to speak on your behalf. This year is not over. So far Congress passed the landmark bi-partisan infrastructure bill that will help replace lead pipes, rebuild roads and bridges, expand broadband coverage, and so much more. I am hopeful the Senate will pass the human infrastructure Build Back Better bill with all of the provisions sent to them from the House of Representatives. This bill will expand childcare coverage, provide paid family leave, immigration protections, increase Medicare coverage, and that’s just the beginning. In this season of giving and hope, we want to continue to pray for our fellow Wisconsinites in Waukesha. [_**If you feel inclined, please make a donation to the United for Waukesha Community Fund to provide support to the victims of that terrible tragedy.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39011903/317985651/111526658?funit_id=3559&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85MzczOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMWViODU4NC0xZjRlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FdLmTh6XIJpAZHh_w83dg4Tq5qyqeVLyuObnQOE2DCU=&emci=8c39e917-1b4e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=21eb8584-1f4e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=1486204) We’ve also listed additional resources at the bottom. Please enjoy this time with your family and be safe. Also, eat a little too much turkey! Looking forward to continuing the fight, Happy Thanksgiving! Together, #WeRepresent,

Gwen Moore Proudly representing Wisconsin's Fourth Congressional District
Proud Co-Lead of the Violence Against Women Act
100% Pro-Choice
Stay Connected! Text "GWEN" to 313131 for campaign updates! If you need additional resources about the Waukesha tragedy, we listed several options below.
* If you are experiencing emotional distress the Disaster Distress Helpline is here for you. Call or text **800-985-5990** to be connected to a trained, caring counselor - 24/7.
* Wisconsin Children’s Hospital has created a helpline at **414-266-6500** to provide emotional and behavioral health support.
* The Milwaukee County Children’s Mobile Crisis Hotline is free for anyone under the age of 23 at **414-257-7621**.
* Wisconsin Children’s Hospital said blood donations are always appreciated. The best way to help is to donate through your regular donation center.
* Several fundraisers have been created to support the community - [_**information on these events can be found here**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39011904/317985652/-1918673283?link_id=2&can_id=978bdefc55d63721a3f931de2c48f951&source=email-weekly-news-from-your-wisconsin-democratic-party-chair-37&email_referrer=email_1366013&email_subject=thanksgiving-reflections-from-your-wisconsin-democratic-party-chair&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85MzczOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMWViODU4NC0xZjRlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FdLmTh6XIJpAZHh_w83dg4Tq5qyqeVLyuObnQOE2DCU=&emci=8c39e917-1b4e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=21eb8584-1f4e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=1486204).

clean_body: Thankful for you My Sisters and Brothers, First and foremost, I want you to know that I am most grateful for your support of me and my efforts to represent you in the United States Congress. You gave me this opportunity and I thank you for this privilege. This year has been unprecedented in the amount of fighting and stalling techniques we have had to endure from Trump’s GOP. They have gone to every length possible to prevent the passage of common-sense laws. I know you deserve better. I fight every day to make sure that you and your families’ voices are heard and to ensure the country is not held hostage by the extremist, right-wing, damaging GOP agenda. Your support is what keeps me in Washington, DC, and it is a blessing to be able to speak on your behalf. This year is not over. So far Congress passed the landmark bi-partisan infrastructure bill that will help replace lead pipes, rebuild roads and bridges, expand broadband coverage, and so much more. I am hopeful the Senate will pass the human infrastructure Build Back Better bill with all of the provisions sent to them from the House of Representatives. This bill will expand childcare coverage, provide paid family leave, immigration protections, increase Medicare coverage, and that’s just the beginning. In this season of giving and hope, we want to continue to pray for our fellow Wisconsinites in Waukesha. We’ve also listed additional resources at the bottom. Friend,

I wanted to make sure I took a moment to reach out and wish you a Happy Thanksgiving.

As my family comes together to celebrate Thanksgiving, it gives me a chance to reflect on all the things I am thankful for, including the men and women who serve to protect our nation, our Police Officers and Firefighters who keep us safe, the doctors and nurses who have worked around the clock over the past 20 months, my family and friends, and the many rights and liberties that we have here in America.

I hope you and your family have a happy and safe Thanksgiving!

Sincerely,

Lisa Scheller
|

|
---

name: Mike Thompson
subject: Happy Thanksgiving!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress unsubscribe: https://email
body:
# [#]
Peter,

I hope you’re having a safe and happy Thanksgiving!

Today I’m taking a step back to reflect on all I'm thankful for. After an unconventional Thanksgiving last year, I am especially thankful to finally be able to gather safely with my friends and family.

Thanksgiving is a great time to gather together and focus on what's important, and to reflect on how far we've come. I'm thankful for the spirit of community that stepped up and helped each other through these unprecedented times.

I am thankful to have folks like you on my team. Always standing up for democracy, you are the reason I am able to fight for our community.

I hope you have a joyful Thanksgiving, and that you’re able to spend time with people you love.

Happy Thanksgiving!

Mike Thompson

subject: the weird thing on my Thanksgiving table

body:
Thanksgiving traditions in my house look like this: Each family has their own unique Thanksgiving traditions, and I wanted to share one of ours with you.
| | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39012674/317989991/1058120998?ms=em-header&refcode=em_20211125_n_s_thanks&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyN2Q5ZWE4Yi0yMzRlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hZfVXtgqLICM1Vk3T5c5LI4RNujCsfmwLY7C3k7Rnl0=&emci=99324147-214e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=27d9ea8b-234e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=14684840)

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39012675/317989992/1058120998?ms=em-header&refcode=em_20211125_n_s_thanks&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyN2Q5ZWE4Yi0yMzRlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hZfVXtgqLICM1Vk3T5c5LI4RNujCsfmwLY7C3k7Rnl0=&emci=99324147-214e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=27d9ea8b-234e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=14684840)
---
| | Team, Each family has their own unique Thanksgiving traditions, and I wanted to share one of ours with you. When I was little, my mom started putting a dish of black olives on our Thanksgiving table. I don’t know why, but as a kid, I would make sure the olive dish was always by my seat at the table so I could do what any kid would do: put olives on each of my fingers. Now that I have kids of my own, my mom dutifully opens up a can of black olives and places them on the table by my kids, so they can do the same. I hope no matter where you are today, you take time to relish in the small, silly traditions that make life whole. I’m thankful for my mom for carrying on this tradition, and I’m thankful to spend time with family I love. Wishing you a full Thanksgiving, Sonia

clean_body: Thanksgiving traditions in my house look like this: Each family has their own unique Thanksgiving traditions, and I wanted to share one of ours with you. | | | | | Team, Each family has their own unique Thanksgiving traditions, and I wanted to share one of ours with you. When I was little, my mom started putting a dish of black olives on our Thanksgiving table. I don’t know why, but as a kid, I would make sure the olive dish was always by my seat at the table so I could do what any kid would do: put olives on each of my fingers. Now that I have kids of my own, my mom dutifully opens up a can of black olives and places them on the table by my kids, so they can do the same. I hope no matter where you are today, you take time to relish in the small, silly traditions that make life whole. I’m thankful for my mom for carrying on this tradition, and I’m thankful to spend time with family I love. Wishing you a full Thanksgiving, Sonia | | | | | = | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | | ---|---|---|--- | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you believe you received this email in error or wish to no longer receive emails from us, . | Paid for by the Committee to Elect Sonia Chang-Díaz

This is bad. _Really bad._

I know this isn't what you want to hear right now: _**but Nancy Pelosi and the Radical Left have BUCKETS of money at the ready. Falling short of our goal simply isn't an option - falling short means we lose the House Majority for good.**_

fundraising gap.")**

I can't extend this offer to everyone and I can only offer it to you for a limited time - but it's critical you rush support before the deadline. _If we fail to make our mark, the Liberal Media, pollsters, and pundits will say it 's indicative of the electoral outcome and everything will snowball. _

**[BUT, if every patriot who gets this email chips in, we'll crush our fundraising goal and leave the Radical Left in the dust. Remember, all donations made in the next 45 minutes will be 300% matched >>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58874598:61hNBO2Nr:m:1:3299561967:5450C2ABE2D3BF7D06908152E741D916:r "BUT, if every

the next 45 minutes will be 300% matched >>>")**

---

We're in a great position to take back the House from Nancy Pelosi - we're just FIVE SEATS AWAY from restoring an America First Agenda in Washington. But Pelosi knows it, just as well as we do, _and she 's panicking._

_She 's dialing up dark money donors.

She's depositing max-out checks.

And last month she outspent and outraised us by MILLIONS._

**Pelosi 's working day and night to ensure we fail. If we fall short of our goal, the Left will BURY us. We can't let Pelosi win, simply because she outspent us. **

There's no way we make our mark without you, Fellow Conservative.

**[I can't extend this deadline again - even for Top Patriots like you. So please, rush your 300% matched donation before the link closes in 45 min.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58874598:61hNBO2Nr:m:1:3299561967:5450C2ABE2D3BF7D06908152E741D916:r "I can’t extend this deadline again – even for Top Patriots like you. rush your 300% matched donation before the link closes in 45 min.")**

Thank you,

Dan Crenshaw

name: John McGuire
subject: Happy Thanksgiving from Team McGuire!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McGuire for Virginia
body:
---
| | | | | | |
---
| |
---

Team,

Tracy and I want to wish you and your loved ones a Happy Thanksgiving! As you join together with family and friends today please know that Team McGuire is thankful for all the hard work and dedication you’ve put forward in the last year to win back Virginia.

Let’s also be sure to say a prayer for all our men and women who are serving overseas and away from home this holiday season.

While there’s still a lot of work to be done to save our nation, Virginians across our Commonwealth have plenty to celebrate this Thanksgiving. From electing Glenn Youngkin, Winsome Sears, and Jason Miyares to lead our state, to taking back the majority in the House of Delegates, we can all enjoy that extra slice of pie knowing that we’ve shifted our Commonwealth in the right direction so that everyone in Virginia can live, work, and raise their families in peace.

God Bless and have a Happy Thanksgiving,

John McGuire
Navy SEAL and Candidate for VA7 John McGuire

Paid for by McGuire for Virginia
---
Use of John McGuires’ military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform
does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. **Our mailing address is:**
11357 Nuckols Road #156

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | Team, Tracy and I want to wish you and your loved ones a Happy Thanksgiving! As you join together with family and friends today please know that Team McGuire is thankful for all the hard work and dedication you’ve put forward in the last year to win back Virginia. Let’s also be sure to say a prayer for all our men and women who are serving overseas and away from home this holiday season. While there’s still a lot of work to be done to save our nation, Virginians across our Commonwealth have plenty to celebrate this Thanksgiving. From electing Glenn Youngkin, Winsome Sears, and Jason Miyares to lead our state, to taking back the majority in the House of Delegates, we can all enjoy that extra slice of pie knowing that we’ve shifted our Commonwealth in the right direction so that everyone in Virginia can live, work, and raise their families in peace. God Bless and have a Happy Thanksgiving, John McGuire Navy SEAL and Candidate for VA7 John McGuire Paid for by McGuire for Virginia Use of John McGuires’ military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. name: Laura Loomer
subject: Thank you, Patriot
body:
I'm surrounded by my family for the holiday, but I wanted to tell you . . . thank you.
| | | | [](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/5Y9i4uesoj763nn7635zFVW892oQ/Gvn6ycrDOy4vKDepwqvlSQ) | Patriot,

I'm surrounded by my family for the holiday, but I wanted to tell you . . . thank you.

With all of the chaos around us that's impacting our nation, my passion is to enact change with my voice by speaking truth to power.

Big Tech and their interests have tried their best to cut me off from reaching you. For years, they've muted and banned my voice and have gone so far as to label me as a "Dangerous Individual" to limit my influence.

But, you've kept listening.

You and millions of other Americans have followed me, and listened to me, despite the attempts of Big Tech to limit my impact.

My voice alone would carry no weight at all, and make no impact, if you weren't there to listen, read, and echo my work.

You've given power to my voice, and together, we are making our nation better.

**So with the greatest sincerity, thank YOU.**

Please enjoy the holiday with your friends and family.

And if you're alone today, know that I've been there, and you are never alone!

Happy Thanksgiving,

Laura Loomer

---

LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460

name: Adam Kinzinger
subject: Thankful for Country & Family
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Country First
body:
| [ ](http://www.country1st.com/?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=thanksgiving_nd&n=1)
---
Friend -- With the holiday weekend upon us, I want to take just a moment to share how thankful I am to lead a movement of so many good, reasonable, and inspiring people who are bound by love of country, rather than political party. Thank YOU for being on the ground floor of this movement with us. It's amazing to think how far we've come in the last 10 months, and that we're just getting started. Our humorous Thanksgiving-themed video has been seen by more than a million people (we appreciate everyone who helped share it!), and we've now released another version - check it out: [](https://www.country1st.com/a_holiday_from_toxic_tribalism?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=thanksgiving_nd&n=2) While this video is meant to be funny, I know many are facing difficult situations at their tables this year due to the toxic tribalism enveloping our country. Please know that you are not alone, and that this movement is working overtime to make things better. And in that spirit, I hope you'll consider us when holiday shopping this year -- we have some great new items and old favorites in our shop. All proceeds go toward defeating toxic politics and those who peddle it.
### [](https://www.country1st.com/shop?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=thanksgiving_nd&n=3)
| [](https://www.country1st.com/shop?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=thanksgiving_nd&n=4 "Shop Country First") [Shop Country First](https://www.country1st.com/shop?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=thanksgiving_nd&n=4)
---
Happy Thanksgiving from Sofia and me and the entire Country First team! We're blessed to have you as part of this family, and to call ourselves Americans.
Country First,

Adam

name: Cole Muzio
subject: Happy Thanksgiving
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRONTLINE POLICY
body:
[](https://a.crowdskout.com/v1-1/email-click/aHR0cHM6Ly9mcm9udGxpbmVwb2xpY3kuY29tLw?b=eyJjc0lkIjo5OTE3MDM3MTEsImNsaWVudElkIjozMzgyLCJvcmdhbml6YXRpb25JZCI6IjIxODUyOTIiLCJzb3VyY2VJZCI6IjI4NzU3IiwiZW1haWxpbmdJZCI6bnVsbCwidjJFbWFpbGluZ0lkIjoxMTY4NywiZnJvbSI6IjQyMDFmNzI1LTE2ODgtNDZkMS1iMDMwLWJkYzU0NmE1OTA1OSJ9) | |
---
|
---
Friend,

On behalf my family and all of us at Frontline, we wish you and your family a Happy and Blessed Thanksgiving.

As always, we are grateful for all of God's blessings bestowed on us as Georgians and Americans. Even as we see the failures of a wicked Biden Administration, we, as believers, can rest on the knowledge that God is in control, that He will provide, and that His will shall be done.

This year, I am incredibly thankful for all of Frontline's supporters. We make a bold move, followed the Lord's leading, and took a risk to launch this endeavor. You stood with us, and you have exceeded your previous generosity and faithfulness.

We wouldn't be able to defend families, advance freedom, and transform our culture without your amazing and steadfast partnership, prayers, friendship, encouragement, and support.

God has blessed us beyond imagining. Every day, I am amazed by the gift He has given in the form of my family. There is nothing more precious!

I'm also thankful for the team and community He has brought to Frontline, the vision we have for the future, and the freedom we do still - despite the President's best efforts - mostly enjoy in this nation.

May you and yours experience tremendous joy and blessing on this special day, and, as you kick off this holiday season, may you know the Savior - for whom we give ultimate thanks - even deeper.
[](https://a.crowdskout.com/v1-1/email-click/aHR0cHM6Ly9mcm9udGxpbmVwb2xpY3kuY29tLw?b=eyJjc0lkIjo5OTE3MDM3MTEsImNsaWVudElkIjozMzgyLCJvcmdhbml6YXRpb25JZCI6IjIxODUyOTIiLCJzb3VyY2VJZCI6IjI4NzU3IiwiZW1haWxpbmdJZCI6bnVsbCwidjJFbWFpbGluZ0lkIjoxMTY4NywiZnJvbSI6IjQyMDFmNzI1LTE2ODgtNDZkMS1iMDMwLWJkYzU0NmE1OTA1OSJ9)
Sincerely,

**Cole Muzio**
_President_
_Frontline Policy Council
_

name: Bridget Barton
subject: Profound Gratitude & Hope for a Better Future
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bridget Barton for Oregon
body:
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/d87bb1bf48eb013366a6b3c4b83ff292/37693/22ae3cfc0a4bd673/fafe0b19cd4f18f2c3d6b838967d376c/37693)
---
On Thanksgiving, I hope you have many, many things to celebrate and give thanks for as you join with your family and friends. Despite the many challenges we face, we are so incredibly BLESSED to be Americans and to be Oregonians. I spent the day before Thanksgiving in an unusual way -- writing literally dozens of thank you notes to Oregonians all over the state. Thank-yous for inviting me into their homes, thank-yous for events they planned on my behalf, thank-yous for volunteer work done for my campaign, and thank yous for contributions large, small, and in-between. Some days I'm still surprised at the fact that I'm running for governor, because I never planned to seek public office. My goal has always been to solve the critical problems our state faces, not to build a political career. But not a day goes by that I'm not grateful for the opportunity to run, to live in this beautiful state, to have had the experiences and successes in my life that qualify me to run and win, and most of all to have the honor of working alongside and serving so many amazing Oregonians. I am humbled by your confidence in me and your support, and so incredibly grateful! What better way to prepare for Thanksgiving than to give thanks for our democracy, and the way it reaches into the lives and homes of so many people to bring campaigns and elections to life.

Today, let us remember all we have to be thankful for – from God’s bounty, to good health, to our brave men and women who protect our great nation, many of whom will spend this Thanksgiving away from their loved ones defending our safety and liberty. All the best to you and your family as we each celebrate our unique blessings on this special holiday.

\- Bridget
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Reed=20Olson=20for=20Congress?=
subject: An Important Message about Heating this Winter
body:
As winter sets in, I - like so many of us - find myself preoccupied with the cost of home heating. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/16c78574d253/a-birthday-wish-8596618?e=0ba866af2d)
---
## November 2021
|
---
Hello, Minnesotans,After another invigorating month spent traversing the 7th district connecting with rural Minnesotans, I look forward to being back in my Bemidji kitchen tomorrow, preparing Thanksgiving dinner for the guests at the Wolfe shelter. I am grateful that they will have a warm meal and a warm place to sleep.As winter sets in, I - like so many of us - find myself preoccupied with the cost of home heating. This year, however, I was particularly alarmed by predictions that heating costs could rise by more than 50% over last year’s prices. Although domestic production of propane and natural gas continues to increase, we have not also seen an increase in domestic supply. Amidst false cries for “energy independence,” corporations artificially drive down supply by prioritizing shipping abroad while jacking up prices at home. The bottom line: _increased heating prices for working families in rural Minnesota._ Heating fuels are critical infrastructure. We must work toward _true_ energy independence and ensure the existence of a healthy domestic reserve in order to keep home heating costs affordable.**What you can do now:** If you are concerned about the increase in heating costs for your household - or for your friends and family - I would encourage you to reach out to your local CAP (_Community Action Program_) to learn more about available programs and services. You can find your local CAP by calling 1-800-657-3710 or clicking the button below. Funds can be limited, so please reach out as soon as possible.
| [Find Your Local Community Action Program](https://gmail.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f55dc7af213002cce7e62bd8&id=75120e7901&e=0ba866af2d)
---
Have a safe, warm and happy Thanksgiving weekend!
_Reed_
|
---
| | | | | |
---
# Breaking Ground
On November 3rd, we officially ‘broke ground’ by planting a few trees at the site of the new day center which will soon be operated by the Nameless Coalition for the Homeless in Bemidji. As Executive Director, I am so grateful to those who donated, and ecstatic to be able to help provide this critical resource to our community. _Homelessness is a policy choice. It is the result of bad public policy and we need to correct it. _|
---
[Listen to My Remarks from the Groundbreaking](https://gmail.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f55dc7af213002cce7e62bd8&id=6c0d4be503&e=0ba866af2d)
---
| | | | | |
---
|
---
| | | | | |
# Staying Connected to My Roots
I am so thankful for the opportunity to speak and listen at The MN Farmers Union Annual Convention in Minneapolis on November 20th. Coming from a farming family, supporting our rural farmers is one of my top priorities. I am eager and inspired to continue fostering productive partnerships with this community. It was also great to hang out with some representatives who also fight for farmers, like Governor Walz, Senators Putnam and Murphy, and Auditor Blaha (I even coordinated outfits with House Speaker Hortman!). Do you want to support Minnesota farmers? Check out _MN Cooks_ , a program run by the MN Farmers Union. My restaurant, The Wild Hare, is one of their farm-to-table partners! Find out which restaurants work with local farmers in your area below:|
---
[Explore MN Cooks Directory](https://gmail.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f55dc7af213002cce7e62bd8&id=26b80f9ce7&e=0ba866af2d)
---
| | | | | |
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| | | | | |
## Are you listening?
I have a podcast! Tune in for bi-weekly campaign updates, local government commentary, and friendly Northwoods banter from your favorite Beltrami County district 2 commissioner.|

[Tune In](https://gmail.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f55dc7af213002cce7e62bd8&id=e4bfa9870b&e=0ba866af2d)

name: Laurel Imer
subject: 🦃 Happy Thanksgiving! 🦃
disclaimer_text: Paid for By Laurel Imer for Congress
body:
A Thanksgiving message from Laurel Imer.
---
| | | | | | |
---

🦃 Happy Thanksgiving! 🦃
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001D1y-PvPptB5waDiF1TVdSBpICX-Z4W-OPMw-yvhoD1rajnD6AlYrjzmiR01vyVaCpmY-X8BDTzprvsr1r9uejlD9GStxWC7w4DZS17JZjc9R5Oa5g1bo6Aw3Z2wCdGwn7LoRu5Y4fygD8YUV5W_4_n8LJEQDdvo61ahanOul6EDL4EZrjK3quievJpV005e1k89XK4i2qgzAWd9PFrpxSGNp_0xLaTa6nhJaURLJEf4s70v7Jjcvlhcn8mhkiGif4F6EflBVoPFX8WiN7THbz_W9Jpe03bpl7ungH4_1Bq7SsZpvg9exePXaH1pSuJXR8JSmsIFztQE=&c=Tp8IZKXIBmjIOKpnHrWrOhH8J1jrIgauCACWtNCDERnK0Fr4pfIAEA==&ch=SwHlFPDJRwdgc629PxdiXai-L60l3l9hVFE3Jz2NpaybeN4C6swEXQ==)
---
| |
---
| Patriot, I wrote this acrostic poem 15 years ago when my son was first beginning to understand the true meaning of Thanksgiving, and I would like to share it with you today.
Today is the day for Heartfelt thanks And reflection upon the Numerous gifts we receive by Knowing that our Savior, the One & Only GOD, Is alive and Victorious in heaven Inviting his children Now and forever, to join Him in Glory!
I am so thankful for each and every one of you that has supported me over the years. I was recently called for comment by Colorado Politics to be featured in their Thanksgiving Piece talking to Colorado's best-known Politicos about what they are thankful for this holiday season.
My response to them was this: "As I reflect on the past year I am most thankful for my family and friends. During these trying times, we need to hold tight to those closest to us and be thankful for every day that we have together. I am grateful to be saved by grace. I am blessed beyond measure to be an American and thankful that every day I am able to walk freely on American soil."
View the full article [here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001D1y-PvPptB5waDiF1TVdSBpICX-Z4W-OPMw-yvhoD1rajnD6AlYrjzmiR01vyVaCpmY-X8BDTzprvsr1r9uejlD9GStxWC7w4DZS17JZjc9R5Oa5g1bo6Aw3Z2wCdGwn7LoRu5Y4fygD8YUV5W_4_n8LJEQDdvo61ahanOul6EDL4EZrjK3quievJpV005e1k89XK4i2qgzAWd9PFrpxSGNp_0xLaTa6nhJaURLJEf4s70v7Jjcvlhcn8mhkiGif4F6EflBVoPFX8WiN7THbz_W9Jpe03bpl7ungH4_1Bq7SsZpvg9exePXaH1pSuJXR8JSmsIFztQE=&c=Tp8IZKXIBmjIOKpnHrWrOhH8J1jrIgauCACWtNCDERnK0Fr4pfIAEA==&ch=SwHlFPDJRwdgc629PxdiXai-L60l3l9hVFE3Jz2NpaybeN4C6swEXQ==).
From my family and I, as well as all of us at Team Imer. I would like to wish you and yours a very Happy Thanksgiving! May your day be filled with laughter, love, family, turkey, and of course a full stomach!
Sincerely,
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Tina=20Ramirez?=
subject: On this day
body:
I am so thankful for all of you. | | |
---
| | [ ](https://Turnredmedia.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=621b2e320db082dad48a1a39c&id=5f0bdded34&e=ae0ea222da)
---
| [ ](https://Turnredmedia.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=621b2e320db082dad48a1a39c&id=954772fa0b&e=ae0ea222da)
---
| Happy Thanksgiving! On this day, I am humbled with gratitude for so much: my daughter, my family, my great nation and those who serve it, and the overwhelming encouragement and backing of all of those who support my campaign.

It is a trying time, as bad policies have made it harder for hardworking American families just to get by.

But as we can sit down for Thanksgiving dinner with our loved ones, we can be thankful for the resilience of the American spirit and the promise of a better tomorrow.

I am so thankful for all of you who have supported me and stood beside me in our work to bring Conservative leadership and Constitutional principles back to the U.S. Congress. I am humbled by your friendship and determination.

I wish you the happiest of Thanksgivings!

-Tina Ramirez
---
|

To All My Friends,
Happy Thanksgiving!

---
---

I am grateful for the sacrifices of our service members and families, who have given us a great nation.
I am grateful for the Alaskan values instilled in me as a child--talk straight, love your family and country, work hard, fight for what you believe.
And I'm thankful for the opportunity our family has had this year to meet thousands of Alaskans who feel forgotten, to hear their thoughts and concerns, and start to fight for them like these Alaskans fought for me.

This Thanksgiving, I want to let the world know how grateful and thankful I am for my family, my life, and Alaska. This year has been an amazing opportunity for us. Being able to make a difference by running for Senate and helping the citizens of Alaska and our nation has been a once-in-a-lifetime experience.

I want to wish everyone a Happy Holiday, enjoy this time with your family.

---
_– Kelly_

clean_body: | | | | We are so grateful To All My Friends, Happy Thanksgiving! I am grateful for the sacrifices of our service members and families, who have given us a great nation. I am grateful for the Alaskan values instilled in me as a child--talk straight, love your family and country, work hard, fight for what you believe. And I'm thankful for the opportunity our family has had this year to meet thousands of Alaskans who feel forgotten, to hear their thoughts and concerns, and start to fight for them like these Alaskans fought for me. This Thanksgiving, I want to let the world know how grateful and thankful I am for my family, my life, and Alaska. This year has been an amazing opportunity for us. Being able to make a difference by running for Senate and helping the citizens of Alaska and our nation has been a once-in-a-lifetime experience. I want to wish everyone a Happy Holiday, enjoy this time with your family. – Kelly | | | | =

name: Steve Chabot
subject: From My Family to Yours
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chabot for Congress
body:
Today as we gather around the table with family and friends, we recount all
that we are thankful for and give thanks for the country God has given us.

Friend,

Today as we gather around the table with family and friends, we recount all
that we are thankful for and give thanks for the country God has given us.

>From the very first Thanksgiving, this day has embodied the American spirit of
perseverance and humble gratitude for all our gifts. Today gives us all an
opportunity to remember the many ways we are blessed by our freedom.

I wanted to write to express my most sincere gratitude for all that you have
done for me and my family.

I am gracious for the many ways you have had my back over the years.

I am so thankful for the privilege of representing southwest Ohio families in
Congress, and fighting for the people and values we all hold dear.

I hope that you and your family have a joyous, blessed Thanksgiving Day today!

– Steve Chabot

Paid for by Chabot for Congress

Click here to unsubscribe.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Rep.=20Jake=20LaTurner?=
subject: Happy Thanksgiving!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner
body:
🦃 What are you thankful for this year? | | | | [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=a68b07cc8b&e=1050d051da)
---
| | | Friends,

Happy Thanksgiving! I hope you're having a great time with friends and family.

[What are you thankful for this year?](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=ba75e131dc&e=1050d051da)
---
| [Tell us What You're Thankful for](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=095a3de948&e=1050d051da "Tell us What You're Thankful for")
---
| This year in Congress has not been an easy one, but the work we've been doing is worth it. It is fulfilling to be able to help out my fellow Kansans.

Personally, I'm thankful that I get to work every day to help the great people of this wonderful state. I am thankful for the freedom this country promises, and I will always fight to maintain it.

Most importantly, I'm thankful to get to spend some valuable time with my family.
---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=c4e5f02f4f&e=1050d051da)
---
| Once again, I hope you have a great day and holiday weekend.
---
| Yours in the fight,

Jake LaTurner
---
| [Let me know what you're thankful for](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=fb7d1f81cd&e=1050d051da "Let me know what you're thankful for")

name: Sign the Card
subject: re: thanks for fixing our roads
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
The Bipartisan Infrastructure Law is a huge accomplishment! Would you please add your name to President Biden's thank you card?
| | | This Thanksgiving, now that Joe Biden has OFFICIALLY signed the Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act into law, we can be thankful that **_millions of Americans are going to get good-paying jobs because of it._**

Jobs building roads. Jobs in manufacturing. Jobs hooking up electric vehicle charging stations and replacing lead pipes. This is a HUGE accomplishment that President Biden got passed _in his very first year in office!_

Joe Biden made this happen, and we’re so grateful for his leadership. That’s why we're asking Democrats in Pennsylvania to sign a thank you card for President Biden, but your signature is missing. **Would you please add your name right away?**

name: Rob Portman
subject: Happy Thanksgiving
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rob Portman for Senate
body:
Thanksgiving is a time to pause with family and friends to reflect on the many
blessings in our lives. I am thankful for family -- Jane and our three

Peter,

Thanksgiving is a time to pause with family and friends to reflect on the many
blessings in our lives.

I am thankful for family -- Jane and our three amazing children -- and I am
deeply grateful for the opportunity to serve the people of Ohio in the U.S.
Senate. I am grateful for my faith that sustains me during challenging times
and for the support of friends.

Today we also remember the blessing of those men and women in uniform who make
sacrifices to protect us here at home and around the world.

>From our family to yours, we wish you a safe and happy Thanksgiving!

All best,

Rob Portman

Paid for by Rob Portman for Senate

name: =?utf-8?Q?Rep.=20Russell=20Fry?=
subject: Happy Thanksgiving to You and Your Family
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://us13.campaign-archive.com/?e=44ebe864a7&u=fbe825a7d15353d1f4f10df98&id=58b75a0a0f)
---
# "Rejoice always, pray continually, give thanks in all circumstances; for this is God’s will for you in Christ Jesus." 1 Thessalonians 5:16-18
Dear Friends,

Today, for me, is a great day to slow down and reflect for a moment. Despite the challenges and stress we all face, we truly have so much to be thankful for. I am incredibly thankful for my family and friends, for my health, for my work and so much more. And I am thankful for you. I wish you and your family blessings. I hope you have a restful and enjoyable Thanksgiving.

God Bless,

Russell
| | | | | |
---|---|---
| | |

name: =?utf-8?Q?Steve=20Haugaard?=
subject: A very happy Thanksgiving to you
body:
| | | |
---
| | | Hello Peter,

I hope you’re having a wonderful Thanksgiving with your loved ones.

America has been so richly blessed – in our nation’s history we have known hardship through wars, famine, and disease, just like the Pilgrims themselves during those first few years after landing at Plymouth Rock. But also like those brave men and women, America has come out on the other side of all those challenges **_stronger_** and **_more thankful for what we have._**

Personally, I am thankful for my family. I’m thankful for my loving and supportive wife; I’m thankful for all of my children, who I have been so blessed to see grow into wonderful people that carry on the important values they were raised to hold; and I’m thankful for my many, many grandchildren who give me hope in our future.

It has been a hard season for the citizens of South Dakota, and there may be more challenges to come.

** We need a steady hand at the wheel.**

We need a governor whose eyes are on the recovery of our state and well-being of our people. We need a governor who is thankful for what they have and the responsibilities they have been given by the people, and isn’t only using the title as a stepping-stone to higher office.

As we approach the end of the year, our campaign for governor needs your help.

[**Would you donate and help elect a governor who will put South Dakota first?**](https://SteveHaugaard.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5c4ed239d47c47ffd9ead77d3&id=47ff5b3adc&e=c654cab7e1)

We’re counting on donations from grassroots conservatives like you to make this work. Click the option that works best for you.
---
| **[$25

$75

$200

$500](https://SteveHaugaard.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5c4ed239d47c47ffd9ead77d3&id=e4a13d693c&e=c654cab7e1)**

**Thank you for your help and have a very happy Thanksgiving!**
---
| Best Regards,

\- Steve Haugaard

_Republican Candidate for Governor _

name: Patrick Clark, Keystone Progress
subject: Finally, some justice to be thankful for.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www
body:
https://www.kpef.info/ [https://www.kpef.info/]

Dear Friend,

With the understanding that until the hate crimes and deaths stop, our jobs are not done... there are new reasons to be thankful this week.

First, yesterday the three white men involved in killing Ahmaud Arbery (who is Black) were found GUILTY in a Georgia court. As you may recall, the three men pursued Arbery, who kept running away from them, until finally he was cornered and ultimately shot by one of them.

Earlier this week, a jury found that more than a dozen of the nation’s most prominent white supremacists and hate groups conspired to intimidate, harass or commit acts of violence during the 2017 rallies in Charlottesville—rallies that led to violence that killed 32-year-old Heather Heyer, and injured dozens. The jury awarded $25 million in damages to 9 injured plaintiffs.

These verdicts affirm what we already knew... but it is refreshing and welcome to see justice being done in a year where that has not always been the case. Especially in states where—let’s face it—justice doesn’t have the longest history of being applied to everyone.

We hope you have a wonderful holiday. We’re thankful for your support and your role in fighting for a better America.

Patrick Clark
Keystone Progress

https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/ [https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/]

name: Mark Ronchetti
subject: We Give Thanks
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Mark Ronchetti for Governor, Anne Perez Treasurer
body:
Krysty, Ava, Ella and I would like to wish you a very Happy Thanksgiving!
Family is at the core of who we are as New Mexicans. We look forward every y

Peter,

Krysty, Ava, Ella and I would like to wish you a very Happy Thanksgiving!
Family is at the core of who we are as New Mexicans. We look forward every year
to our family coming in to spend time with us around Thanksgiving. It’s a
chance for them to see first-hand why we love this state so much.

We hope you get to spend time with those you love and can give thanks that we
all live in the greatest country in the world. May God bless you and your
family. And May God bless New Mexico!

Sincerely,

Mark, Krysty, Ava and Ella

name: Team Kina
subject: Gratitude
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KINA COLLINS FOR CONGRESS** ](https://u1584542
body:
Our campaign has so much to be thankful for | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yOQozAy4249GfohatM8XLCP7Gyf6bzrkjN8sXh_JjXvDm21fvmGLhqUe-quR3_x0bPZYqqRmKw-ebpnqlyWdsbb4WUxyyDpjjPMxiSxHH8szcejGrlBLYdy0UA9y55cP3muSA5MNVkWIBpWcPVSvw70KBNaD_J2UYOeyHX0P-RQ8LuU9oLm01F-mc-HRsXQ5u5f0m0w9smX0-elTWQCPqtKgiQ1c23xJp7xLvd71jE6lOzI4hmB76fI7UQtD8XO-W3y7cNx3dZQgIC_2rVjPObS76VxFOxYBqKylU8LU2DpWiJTvop0A3yi9uBMQXdSOs/3hb/P68DMqFfTSyytPC2WVc7cQ/h0/cNl23jhDQpmOxfu8BBUIdIK_Ttm3QlT-tmVwKMTZN7M) Dear Friend, Thanksgiving is in some ways a complicated holiday. While for many, Thanksgiving is a time for gathering and celebration, it’s also a time to remember and acknowledge the injustices faced by Indigenous communities in America. It's long past time that we as a nation honor and celebrate our Indigenous neighbors, and shine a light on a history that has been erased and ignored for far too long. Thanksgiving is also a time for reflection and gratitude, and thanks to you, our team has so much to be grateful for. Even though we are still months away from our primary, we have already seen an incredible amount of support from working class people and progressive organizations:
* Thank you to our campaign’s volunteers who have already completed hundreds of shifts and contacted well over 25,000 voters in the district.
* Thank you to the thousands of individual donors powering this campaign. Everyday people who make an average donation of $47.
* Thank you to the local and national organizations & leaders that have stepped up to stand in solidarity with our campaign: 14th Ward IPO, Black Lives Matter Women of Faith, Coalition for Change IL3, Earth Remedies, Elect Black Women PAC, Illinois Youth Climate Movement, Indivisible National, Indivisible Western Springs, Justice Democrats, Northside DFA, Oak Park + River Forest Sunrise Hub, Protect the Frontline, Way To Lead, We Have The People PAC, Western Front Indivisible, Women's March Illinois, Youth Committee 4 Change, Berwyn Alderman Joe Carmichael, Berwyn Alderman Rob Pabon, Oak Park Township Trustee Tim Thomas

Most importantly, thank you to the people who have fought all of this year to hold our government accountable, and to make sure our leaders keep the promises they made us when they were elected. You have achieved so much, and asked for nothing in return but equal treatment, opportunities for you and your families, and a country that keeps its promises and lifts up the most marginalized among us. I feel the energy of our community flowing through this campaign. Thank you for standing with me shoulder to shoulder. In Solidarity, Kina Collins | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

Everyday people who make an average donation of $47. * Thank you to the local and national organizations & leaders that have stepped up to stand in solidarity with our campaign: 14th Ward IPO, Black Lives Matter Women of Faith, Coalition for Change IL3, Earth Remedies, Elect Black Women PAC, Illinois Youth Climate Movement, Indivisible National, Indivisible Western Springs, Justice Democrats, Northside DFA, Oak Park + River Forest Sunrise Hub, Protect the Frontline, Way To Lead, We Have The People PAC, Western Front Indivisible, Women's March Illinois, Youth Committee 4 Change, Berwyn Alderman Joe Carmichael, Berwyn Alderman Rob Pabon, Oak Park Township Trustee Tim Thomas Most importantly, thank you to the people who have fought all of this year to hold our government accountable, and to make sure our leaders keep the promises they made us when they were elected. You have achieved so much, and asked for nothing in return but equal treatment, opportunities for you and your families, and a country that keeps its promises and lifts up the most marginalized among us. I feel the energy of our community flowing through this campaign. Thank you for standing with me shoulder to shoulder. In Solidarity, Kina Collins | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Alek Skarlatos
subject: Thankful.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alek For Oregon
body:
Most importantly, I am thankful for the proud Americans serving in our Armed Forces who aren’t able to be home for this holiday - you have my deepest I am so grateful to be fighting for our shared conservative values. The outpouring of support and engagement our campaign has received from thousands of Oregonians has been incredible. |
---
Peter,

There is so much to be thankful for when we pause and reflect.

I am so grateful to be fighting for our shared conservative values. The outpouring of support and engagement our campaign has received from thousands of Oregonians has been incredible.

I am thankful to live in a country where we can chart our own future and live freely.

And most importantly, **I am thankful for the proud Americans serving in our Armed Forces who aren’t able to be home for this holiday** - _you have my deepest gratitude._

Thank you, Peter, for being by my side this year. I am thankful to have the support of folks just like you. **I hope you have a great Thanksgiving with family and friends today.**

God Bless,

Alek Skarlatos
Republican for Congress

| Alek is a former Oregon National Guardsman, completing a nine-month deployment in Afghanistan. Alek, along with four others, stopped an armed terrorist on a Paris-bound train traveling from Amsterdam to Paris in August 2015. His heroism earned him several awards and medals around the world. name: Colin Schmitt
subject: Happy Thanksgiving
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schmitt for Congress
body:
From My Family To Yours

|
---
Friends,

On behalf of the entire Schmitt Family, I want to wish every American a healthy and Happy Thanksgiving!

We are very blessed to call this Nation our home. And that’s what America is, OUR HOME. It’s where we raise our families, care for our loved ones, look out for our neighbors, and live out our dreams.

Let us give thanks for all that we have on this wonderful day.

Happy Thanksgiving and God Bless!

Thank you,

Colin Schmitt
_Republican Candidate in New York’s 18th Congressional District_
| Paid for by Schmitt for Congress
---

name: Cheri Beasley
subject: Happy Thanksgiving!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
I hope today finds you surrounded by family, friends, and loved ones.
#

Hey team -
Happy Thanksgiving! I hope today finds you surrounded by family, friends, and loved ones.
I was lucky enough to have both my twin sons, my in-laws and a cousin join us for Thanksgiving this year. It reminded me how much time with family (and a break from the campaign trail) can help you recharge.
But, as we gather to celebrate and give thanks, I’m also reminded of the call to serve others — particularly our most vulnerable.
The pandemic has shed a light on how rampant food insecurity is in North Carolina. Right now, our state ranks tenth in the nation in hunger — with nearly 600,000 people lacking enough food to eat each day.
And while there are long-term efforts we must make to ensure that no one goes hungry, there’s immediate action we can take, too. Right now.
So I’m hoping you will consider joining me today in supporting the Food Bank of Central and Eastern NC to make sure more families have meals on their table this holiday season.
**[If you can, please consider donating to the Food Bank of Central and Eastern North Carolina to help us put food on our neighbors' tables this holiday season. Your gift will help provide food and hope to families, children and seniors right here in our community.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cheribeasley-foodbank?refcode=em211125-1-t2&refcode2=61.357359._mnb7L&t=1&akid=61%2E357359%2E_mnb7L)**
With the support of people all over North Carolina, the Food Bank of Central and Eastern NC provided over 115 million meals in the last year alone. Let’s add to that number by putting more food on the table for families across the state.
Thank you and happy Thanksgiving,
Cheri Beasley
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cheribeasley-foodbank?refcode=em211125-1-t2&refcode2=61.357359._mnb7L&t=2&akid=61%2E357359%2E_mnb7L)**

Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
PO Box 28778
Raleigh, NC 27611
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you want to receive fewer emails, you may [submit this form to get only our most important updates](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=61%2E357359%2E_mnb7L). Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts, but if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.cheribeasley.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=61%2E357359%2E_mnb7L). If you would like to support Cheri's campaign for the U.S. Senate in North Carolina, please consider [making a donation](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beasley-em-2021?refcode=em-footer&t=5&refcode2=61_357359__mnb7L&akid=61%2E357359%2E_mnb7L) today to help us make history.

body:
Happy Thanksgiving from Jim Banks. What are you thankful for? Only ONE Flag belongs in the White House Happy Thanksgiving, friend! This time of year, I like to take a few moments to remember what I’m thankful for, and who I’m fighting for. [](http://links.jimbanks.us/u/click?_t=14b4f09b550c426eb4f913b115f47659&_m=057cb62748824319b4b63497c1192873&_e=HrOCDeeVdzMZOim8kCn6XuL6q_T35NfsU0EpPthQh-ruUuTqbdTi7B0U-BWXh3IrMuXVppg09oMikmh6H3r8MmScQr9aBWLIn5gTVapkRcQ-27QctlDTdExkiuvL41_v9jlUJbUt3EovKfNgHtuV3jSgBYUx1mfYht0NhHtlloTZXcPaq7bFvjA8B_F4A-XBCnWP_QW342XyKnw0Kf6H3yg-Brgw7Wfoa_Pzt-XlqmJOXf8DPeDEm5M5cQuvLgJFRgt9oLl6WauINr-PItLt57B6o7Y9wfjpiOJChnvHx0jmCoVfUYR77FXu6xJKkeco9aXmbMCPK1yp544Hnwhv02cy8UqXP-6IQXT2TxWIyCkaVGx3DluEgOMS2KVxnpGTXO5XCA3O_8m_mt3KyDJbPGJVUKmYtDx8lDKSEnt1exEDgwqoY6LjpIzAtGoCwJNYVHmZ9hK789oMFHeW3Y2Giw%3D%3D) This Thanksgiving, more than ever, I’m thankful for a **happy and healthy family**. My loving and devoted wife and my three incredible daughters are the reason I work so hard every single day. I’m so glad we can all be together this year to celebrate. And of course, **_I’m thankful for YOU._** Your incredible support is what makes it possible for me to do what I do, and to fight for the causes we’re all passionate about. **I’m curious to know what YOU’RE thankful for, friend!****
**[**Click this link to let me know here >>>**](http://links.jimbanks.us/u/click?_t=14b4f09b550c426eb4f913b115f47659&_m=057cb62748824319b4b63497c1192873&_e=HrOCDeeVdzMZOim8kCn6XuL6q_T35NfsU0EpPthQh-ruUuTqbdTi7B0U-BWXh3IrMuXVppg09oMikmh6H3r8MmScQr9aBWLIn5gTVapkRcQ-27QctlDTdExkiuvL41_v9jlUJbUt3EovKfNgHtuV3jSgBYUx1mfYht0NhHtlloTZXcPaq7bFvjA8B_F4A-XBCnWP_QW342XyKnw0Kf6H3yg-Brgw7Wfoa_Pzt-XlqmJOXf8DPeDEm5M5cQuvLgJF6JCcaqjSvGQVZ2f04rJNfI2NObJMf2FC8tmYW2idDUj0I7pXT20kUfy3qT7udWZF3lHpPBfNyxM511Z6yNlLi-gJRxhtsa1EGBx3rt06UX78DOkqB06vilDoaFTbW7GG5YehO2Fu5Ktvlc9E5Ag-Q3OR7LA9ccpDFRAvc7IK1kCYxmXav8PABq2NiTNv0pM89EOXoIn302_5evcd3nvzGw%3D%3D)

Wishing you a happy Thanksgiving, Jim Banks PAID FOR BY JIM BANKS FOR CONGRESS, INC.

name: Derek Schmidt
subject: Happy Thanksgiving
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC
body:
I am writing today to wish you and your family a very Happy Thanksgiving from my family. Today is a day we celebrate our blessings – the nation we ca Friend, I am writing today to wish you and your family a very Happy Thanksgiving from my family. Today is a day we celebrate our blessings – the nation we call home, our proud state, and the generations who came before us. We reflect on the gifts bestowed on us because we are Americans. We are the land of the free and the home of the brave and with God’s continued blessings, we will continue to be so. **I am also thankful for you. ** Jennifer, our girls, and I are grateful to have you on our team. I hope that today is filled with joy, happiness, love of family and friends, and good food. God Bless, Derek | |
---
PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC.,
KELLY ARNOLD, TREASURER.

name: Admiral Mike Franken
subject: turkey and sweet potato casserole
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MICHAEL FRANKEN FOR IOWA, INC
body:
| | | | [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDM-EBQfsbGG-s9DaLmbUEihpOkig6mNguK8yZijudTPis4F4Mj8IH3nnr6OeImF8tMAs0CyzkY1kT5Ibz-xHNlRjU2B2mHOaE7LEbUlT6W9zZF3zTorfAc09wB9ormBBJeYviODBuJ8Xd80qBuhobc0dwVlF9VP8SP-21bip4fiJANGkEjeYjHNk3U3BMmSUHjznhNT3uXEg8jWNn4ufEwYbwkzwylTIZwOqcEkvDu0W2tCv98q0xHgxMqvpjxl2eQ/3hb/FXX80YQGTZK7JeB8__Vznw/h0/hKYelmNRTG0Tlz9N8JFjx3xyFFjeO6mOPa6ZttKJ9QM)
---
Hello,
This Thanksgiving holiday, my appreciation extends to those who are behind the scenes every morning.
It’s the delivery driver whose route begins two hours before sunup; the 11-to-7 hospital worker who can never quite catch a good day’s sleep; the night mechanic working to ensure the equipment works; and the legions of military personnel standing watch at desks, outposts, and bridges of ships both here and afar.
These people keep the wheels of commerce going, the lights on, the sick on the path of healing. My thanks go to them who give us pleasant mornings, good food, and a safe environment every day.
My appreciation is tinged with sadness in knowing that on Thanksgiving there are those who have no one. They live on the street or alone, unseen and lonely on a day when such things shouldn’t be.
Hence, my family celebrates Thanksgiving with a customary circle of friends and a twist — we find a few people who haven’t anywhere to go and share the day with them. It has led to interesting conversations, an expanded understanding of others, fewer leftovers, and bigger smiles.
I urge everyone to reach out for Thanksgiving this year. It is time to build relationships, and I hear turkey and sweet potato casserole work well for that.
Happy Thanksgiving, everyone!
Mike Franken, VADM, U.S. Navy (ret.)

People have been asking me recently what my plans are for the upcoming election. As one of our top America First supporters, I wanted you to be one of the first to know that I've made a decision:

**I 'm 100% committed to helping Republicans win office all across the country in 2022, and I'm focusing all efforts on just that. **

That's why I formed CAVPAC - my political organization committed to electing principled conservative leaders who won't be silenced and who refuse to give an inch to the radical Left. I'm traveling all over the country to push our candidates to victory and to fire up Republicans to turn out and vote.

_**Momentum is on our side, and we must seize the moment and double down on championing American values.**_

While some people are just sitting silently on the sidelines, I'm staying in the fight to save America and to champion the core values that make America great.

Do you support this mission? If so, **[please rush an emergency donation of $100, $50 or $20 to help us keep up the momentum.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58876127:JNu3_O2N8:m:1:3253819041:24A899A39DA38B5230A3DD3A534FCC58:r "please rush an
