name: Derek Kilmer
subject: Being with our loved ones
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Dear Peter,

Today, I am enormously thankful for so many things (yes - more than pie and football).

I'm thankful for the scientists and doctors who have worked tirelessly throughout this pandemic to support our communities and help save lives. Thanks to their dedication and commitment, many of us across the country are able to gather in person with our families once again.

**I can 't wait to sit at the Thanksgiving table with my family later this evening, and I hope you have a safe place to gather with your loved ones, too.**

I also wanted to give thanks to the brave service members who are defending our nation abroad. They are all in the hearts and minds of countless Americans tonight and every night.

I am thankful for the employers in our region that are providing good jobs - even during this pandemic - and for the workers who have gone the extra mile in the face of some real challenges.

I want to give thanks to our first responders and all who helped our communities weather some brutal storms over these last few weeks.

As always, I'm also thankful for my family. I go to work every day because I want to build a better future for my kiddos - and for all Americans.

Finally, I'm thankful for folks in our region for allowing me to represent you - and for the amazing group of professionals who are part of my team who work on your behalf every day. It's the honor of a lifetime to serve you and the country we love.

It's an honor to represent you,

Derek

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/1IVq6qrGEAW1jc4SSEPV5ZJYsoMCl5_Zo3gPAReGNiQ=/KbW7yNtB_P_CMFEVdROSif2VbbwQlJTcEm9YjT0ns0g=) | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/1IVq6qrGEAW1jc4SSEPV5ZJYsoMCl5_Zo3gPAReGNiQ=/SgeD1VhLQjf2-edlaL8i_W_qyh9GnJCGY4p0QN3cunE=)
---|---
Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
---

People for Derek Kilmer
PO Box 1381
Tacoma WA 98402 United States

Peter, thank you so much for being a supporter of Derek Kilmer and Democrats up and down the ballot.

Our digital program helps us reach folks with the latest updates. But, if you'd rather not hear from our team, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/1IVq6qrGEAW1jc4SSEPV5ZJYsoMCl5_Zo3gPAReGNiQ=/ouY194_QOPLgvtQJlRPaIYMq8RRXiA_OoHNddvnJjUM=).
clean_body: Dear Peter, Today, I am enormously thankful for so many things (yes - more than pie and football). I'm thankful for the scientists and doctors who have worked tirelessly throughout this pandemic to support our communities and help save lives. Thanks to their dedication and commitment, many of us across the country are able to gather in person with our families once again. I can 't wait to sit at the Thanksgiving table with my family later this evening, and I hope you have a safe place to gather with your loved ones, too. I also wanted to give thanks to the brave service members who are defending our nation abroad. They are all in the hearts and minds of countless Americans tonight and every night. I am thankful for the employers in our region that are providing good jobs - even during this pandemic - and for the workers who have gone the extra mile in the face of some real challenges. I want to give thanks to our first responders and all who helped our communities weather some brutal storms over these last few weeks. As always, I'm also thankful for my family. I go to work every day because I want to build a better future for my kiddos - and for all Americans. Finally, I'm thankful for folks in our region for allowing me to represent you - and for the amazing group of professionals who are part of my team who work on your behalf every day. It's the honor of a lifetime to serve you and the country we love. It's an honor to represent you, Derek = | = ---|--- Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer People for Derek Kilmer PO Box 1381 Tacoma WA 98402 United States Peter, thank you so much for being a supporter of Derek Kilmer and Democrats up and down the ballot. Our digital program helps us reach folks with the latest updates. But, if you'd rather not hear from our team, please =.

Take time to be thankful today, spend time with family, and remember that God has a plan for each of us. It's an honor to represent my friends and neighbors in Congress. name: Great America Update
subject: You can help restore hope in our country
body:
The story of America reveals a spirit of exploration, courage, and independence [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6517%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=kdyZBYq5L4dKoMxwahyvPA&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67207%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=aFWKkSbCr7PIBHX%2bWQkjIw&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, Have you read about President Biden’s Ambassador to the United Nations? She is telling her fellow ambassadors from around the world that “white supremacy” is “weaved into [America’s] founding documents and principles.” Can you imagine being told that America’s glorious founding principle--the principle that “all men are created equal,” endowed by God with “unalienable rights”--embodies the idea of white supremacy? Can you imagine being told the same thing about our cherished **Constitution** , which is responsible for America becoming the freest, most prosperous nation in human history? That America’s United Nations Ambassador is promoting these lies is reprehensible. But even more reprehensible is the fact that so many K-12 and college students in America are being taught this same false narrative. Too many young Americans are not learning what makes America an exceptional nation and a beacon of liberty for the world. Instead, they learn that our great nation’s history is essentially a history of injustice--that America at its heart has **always** been racist and is undeserving of respect. Is it any wonder that so many younger Americans today feel an increasing attraction to so-called “critical race theory” and other ideas destructive of liberty? Is it any wonder that there is decreasing support among younger Americans for basic liberties that past generations have revered and taken for granted--liberties such as freedom of speech? It is easy to become discouraged by the Left’s dominance in our colleges and universities and its increasing influence in K-12 education. But we must not lose hope--we must fight back with the truth. **Hillsdale College has been engaging the Left on the battlefield of education from the beginning. ** In fact, we produced a free online course that helps do just that, titled **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope.”** And I’m asking for your help in promoting it to additional millions of Americans--especially younger Americans--and to expand our other critical outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide. You can help fund the promotion of this important course at this secure link: _**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67208%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5bJnW3wMFDSexsYJQ8%2fYRg&sysid=1)**_ [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67209%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3c3iYc7CZCqALsWVyUyLEA&sysid=1) Historian and Hillsdale professor Wilfred McClay teaches the course based on his published history of America. **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** presents a full, unbiased account of America’s past. Our goal in producing and promoting this free online course is to **restore the kind of intelligent patriotism --especially among our young people--that is essential to preserving free government.** This work is the surest means of defending liberty--which is why we make every online course available **free of charge** to any citizen wishing to learn. **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** is a powerful counterweight to _The New York Times_ ’ “1619 Project,” which seeks to inject the idea that America is essentially unjust into the curricula of America’s K-12 schools. Of course, producing an online course and making it available free of charge requires significant resources--and promoting the course nationwide, which is essential, costs even more. To date, more than 118,000 Americans have enrolled in **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** --but we must do more. Your support is critical to our success. As you may know, Hillsdale refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student loans and grants. That’s why we can remain true to our mission on behalf of liberty, free of so many bureaucratic regulations that burden other colleges and universities. This independence also means that all of our work is entirely dependent on the support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. This is especially true of our national outreach efforts, including free online courses. **Can I count on you today to help fund the promotion of “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope” to millions of Americans nationwide and expand our other educational outreach efforts with a generous tax-deductible gift of $100 or more? ** Please make your best tax-deductible gift using this secure link: _**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67208%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5bJnW3wMFDSexsYJQ8%2fYRg&sysid=1)**_ We deeply appreciate your partnership in promoting the kind of intelligent patriotism--especially among younger Americans--that is essential to preserving free government. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 **P.S.** For a gift of $100 or more, we’ll send you our online course, **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope,” in a handsome DVD box set. The course explores America’s history as a land of hope founded on high principles** and counters the far-Left’s false narrative about our country. Thank you so much for helping us promote intelligent patriotism--especially among younger Americans. _**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67208%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5bJnW3wMFDSexsYJQ8%2fYRg&sysid=1)**_
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_

name: Self Reliance Central
subject: Future generations are counting on your response
body:
Please take time right now to review and complete Hillsdale College’s RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle
This sponsored message from Self Reliance Central is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zc8buvgp6njrucnnf7qkgmneh75pammbtardq0o8_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c3jm9ob2c5h2bs) Dear Fellow American, Can you do me a favor? Please take time right now to review and complete Hillsdale College’s [**RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey**.](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zvq3rba16j3c4je3quqp6d687lj1s4mc2uek91tg_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c3jm9ob2c5h2bs) My name is Bill Gray, and I’m the associate vice president of national donor outreach at Hillsdale College. It’s my responsibility to invite like-minded conservatives (like you!) to support Hillsdale. **I don’t use the word “battle” lightly, but with the stakes so high one must be blunt.** It’s clear to me that we are in a fight for the future of our nation—a fight against progressives who are targeting our youngest citizens. These so-called “progressives” seek to undermine traditional patriotism and ultimately transform American government and society. _The New York Times’_ recent “1619 Project” is the prime example of this effort to inject into the minds of our youngest citizens a biased distortion of our nation’s history. If you haven’t heard, the “1619 Project” places the founding of America in 1619, when the first slave arrived in Jamestown, rather than in 1776 when the Declaration of Independence proclaimed that “all men are created equal” and endowed by God with “unalienable rights.” **“Our democracy’s founding ideals,” the “1619 Project” proclaims, “were false when they were written.”** Outrageous! _The New York Times’_ stated goal with the “1619 Project” is to influence the curricula of K-12 schools nationwide. They teach young people that slavery—not freedom—is and always will be the central and defining idea of the American experience, making our country irredeemable. This project has garnered universal acclaim from the news media. In fact, the lead essayist just won a Pulitzer Prize! There are even talks about making the “1619 Project” into a feature film. **Given popular and widespread efforts like these, we should not be surprised that there is a decreasing sense of patriotism among younger Americans—and an increasing tendency to embrace socialism and other liberty-destroying ideas.** Education has become a battleground, and reviving a proper understanding of American history and government, especially among younger citizens, must be our** _most urgent priority._** Hillsdale College is at the forefront of this effort. **We are actively engaging the Left on the battlefield of education. And I need your help to make this effort even more effective.** Hillsdale is America’s most powerful advocate for intelligent and informed patriotism—our best defense against the loss of our liberty and insidious beliefs like socialism. We do this on our Michigan campus, with an undergraduate and graduate student body of over 1,500, and through education that reaches and teaches millions of citizens each year on behalf of liberty. And in response to new efforts such as the media-driven “1619 Project” that seek to turn the next generation of citizens against the principles of the Declaration of Independence and the U.S. Constitution, Hillsdale must expand this critical work—especially in 2020. As I said before, to fight and win this battle, Hillsdale needs your help right away. The FIRST step I need you to take right now is to complete the **RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY! Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey**. This national project seeks to make it clear that people in your state and nationwide still revere our founding principles of liberty, and refuse to let them be corrupted by those who hold America in contempt. **As _The New York Times’_ efforts make clear, powerful forces vehemently oppose this view of America, and their assault on our glorious history is taking place before our very eyes. ** _Our ongoing response, rooted in genuine learning, and proven to reach millions of citizens, must be escalated as quickly as possible._ And if, upon completing your Battle Plan, you feel a strong connection to Hillsdale’s work, then I urge you to please consider including a generous tax-deductible gift in support of expanding these efforts on behalf of liberty. Based on the costs of Hillsdale’s multiple educational programs—which I will outline fo**r you shortly—it has been determined that to fully implement this[RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z8l7j3grc4cam1t6gl1uhgm7q1mj51q5g9614pi8_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c3jm9ob2c5h2bs)** for maximum impact, Hillsdale College must raise at least $1,016,700 within the next month. And unlike most colleges and universities that rely on federal funding and subsidies, EVERY PENNY of funding for Hillsdale’s educational outreach comes from the voluntary support of intelligent patriots like you. This is because Hillsdale College refuses EVEN ONE PENNY of state or federal taxpayer funding—even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. That’s so important, I need to say it again—Hillsdale College refuses EVERY PENNY of government funding! **In this way, Hillsdale remains truly independent, avoiding unconstitutional regulations that would violate the College’s educational mission.** Hillsdale has built national support from hundreds of thousands of citizens. These intelligent patriots know that liberty in America is in trouble thanks to progressive control of our schools and institutions. And these citizens are determined to preserve our liberty—as I believe you are. These supporters give what they can, when they can—gifts of $25 or $50 or more, sometimes much more ... because they understand that every dollar given goes to reaching and teaching millions of people—including our nation’s youth—with genuine learning about liberty and the Constitution. The gift you choose to give today will determine whether Hillsdale can activate each component of the **[RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey.](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zromnralplh6vhbd7mla6q28bi59v2p6rpp614tg_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c3jm9ob2c5h2bs)** And this entire plan is tied to Hillsdale’s proven programs and publications that are educating millions of Americans right now. Here are the key aspects of Hillsdale’s plan for your review and feedback: **BATTLE PLAN POINT #1: Identify the Critical Concerns of Everyday Americans** I mentioned that our network of supporters that is hundreds of thousands of patriots strong—such a broad base of support gives us invaluable public-opinion data on what Americans are MOST concerned about given the current state of our nation. We are always eager to add new perspectives (like yours) that can make our work the most relevant and timely possible. **Your participation today will allow Hillsdale to strengthen our educational outreach efforts by targeting them where they’re needed most, on the areas of concern that matter most to the American people.** You were selected to be part of this effort based on your record of involvement in causes that strengthen America, AND because of Hillsdale’s confidence that you will respond quickly and honestly, lending your voice to our efforts to restore the Constitution. I’m counting on and very much looking forward to your survey response! **BATTLE PLAN POINT #2: Counter Progressive Teaching in America’s Schools** In this section we dig deep into Hillsdale’s proven educational outreach, and give you a sense of how we lead important conversations surrounding America’s history and founding principles—AND ask what YOU think about these efforts. And make no mistake—Hillsdale is uniquely qualified to drive this effort. Did you know that Hillsdale is one of only a few American colleges and universities that requires each student, regardless of major, to complete a one-semester course on the Constitution? This fact has earned the support of so many Americans who did not attend the College, and who have never even set foot on our campus—they understand that what we teach in our classrooms radiates all over America. Is this important to you? In 2012, Hillsdale began offering online courses _free of charge_ , because we see it as an effective way promote intelligent patriotism and civic virtue. We market the courses on social media and online to reach large audiences, especially younger Americans. The response has been tremendous—over 2.3 million citizens have taken one or more of our online courses. Do you think this is an effective means of reaching and teaching millions of Americans on behalf of liberty? We even have an online course that directly counters _The New York Times’_ “1619 Project.” This free course is called **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** and presents an unbiased and complete account of America’s past. To me this is a great example of why these free courses are needed: They safeguard the country, through education, against the damage to liberty inflicted by the Left. And what do you think about sending a free monthly digest of liberty, to millions of people? This newsletter is called _Imprimis_ , and it features speeches delivered at Hillsdale events by prominent scholars, journalists, and policymakers, focused on political, economic, historic, and cultural topics from a constitutional viewpoint. _Imprimis_ is America’s most widely-circulated publication in support of liberty, reaching more households and businesses than either the _Wall Street Journal_ or the “fake news” _New York Times_. Issues covering topics such as “Rediscovering the Wisdom of American History” and “Shall We Defend our Common History?” set _Imprimis_ apart. The publication is as a powerful counterbalance to the biased media outlets that pursue narrow, ideologically driven distortions of history. (If you’re not yet an _Imprimis_ subscriber, we’ll be happy to sign you up as soon as we hear from you.) **BATTLE PLAN POINT #3: Restore Excellence to K-12 Schools** In this section we explore how Hillsdale College is reshaping American K-12 education, especially through our Barney Charter School Initiative, which helps launch and guide classical K-12 charter schools nationwide, teaching thousands of K-12 students. These schools all have a strong civics curriculum. The curriculum provides young Americans with a solid grounding in our nation’s history, our limited constitutional government, and economics. In doing so, Hillsdale provides communities with a practical model of how schools can best serve students and the country. **Sustained by our supporters, Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative has assisted in the founding of more than 20 classical K-12 charter schools in 11 states, with approximately 12,000 students enrolled. And more of these K-12 schools are opening each year.** Do you support this effort to set a new standard for K-12 education and give young Americans a proper education? Hillsdale also launched a new initiative to send pocket Constitutions to thousands of elementary and junior high schools. We ship them with a promise to send as many pocket Constitutions as their schools need. **The response has been astounding.** We’ve now sent out more than 500,000 pocket Constitutions across the country, and we receive more requests every week. Does this effort to restore the Constitution to K-12 schools sound like a good idea to you? As you select your answers, I believe you will find that Hillsdale’s educational outreach is a powerful way to confront and ultimately overcome the progressive forces that seek to instill in young people the ruinous idea that America stands for slavery, not freedom. I know you love this country, and I hope you will partner with Hillsdale in defending America through education—education aimed at citizens of all ages nationwide. The first step is getting your thoughts on our **[RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey.](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zbhsor8l769rpl1eopdetuthicq7ia00apv2s8u0_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c3jm9ob2c5h2bs)**
With your response you will represent your state as part of a major sampling of citizen opinion that can help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views and concerns of mainstream Americans—views that we can make available to policymakers and opinion leaders when we discuss the Left’s agenda, and use to strengthen our educational outreach efforts. What Hillsdale needs now is YOU—your thoughtful input on the work we’re doing, and your generous support to expand our work. **So please complete the[Battle Plan Survey](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zj734lpijvmv2333sf7eesg8q852hn6ij27jkdio_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c3jm9ob2c5h2bs) today.**
When you give to Hillsdale and share your opinions, you will join a dedicated and growing team of intelligent patriots, who always step up when the time comes to defend America against the progressives’ attack on American history and liberty. Thank you for your commitment to liberty in America. Warm regards,
Bill Gray
Assoc. Vice President of National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 **P.S**. We are in a battle for the future of America, because the Left is determined to transform our country ... by fundamentally changing how history is taught to young people. name: Tiffany
subject: Happy Thanksgiving!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shedd for Attorney General
body:
Friends, Our state and our nation face a lot of challenges, but we also have much to be grateful for. We are reminded in Philippians 4:6,7 to _not be anxious about anything, but in every situation, by prayer and petition, with thanksgiving, present your requests to God._ _And the peace of God, which transcends all understanding, will guard your hearts and your minds in Christ Jesus._ We are incredibly blessed to live in a nation that has enshrined in its highest laws our God given individual liberties. I am grateful to all Americans from all walks of life, past and present, who work and sacrifice so that we may remain free. [](http://links.sheddforaz.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=247708c394c5445c883d268b9200f141&_e=gSfP_6JZnqZ-I6kJUnffsmTiAAzZ60eFOBwKj89PcNK8IG1O99NlOFMs-DNSEByb1KZwn4gSOllduZQQlrMDvKMqdAZMIHPfKp2m3d928dF0x8KROr1VVOpU9ZMLnUmjhB1xXx_CB5ux7grDyQAZX_wcEFd0cLjDhrG-lFNI0mmQiqatIp7DYq5BZ37AMa0GiuRzl-X1-BV34JeQDh0qrVmHANuaP5OyMWDyfy7A-wkWqeZihMpAeVbxhlv-109xNEpHayzeyTGL7NOjJFGAqN2xWdyp90HcmPUBqGjtttR1-EJQHKYgRVvOlRoKodAuNR2UO58cFnmKMzlJ0Zu2Zx86565a91FXXVPegPZKdv7Z3KZqf5mWwvOZpZfB6senz2LkCczo-6vfJyEPC9QpOAcK_UHI68IZ3yFwUU3NyaU%3D) Happy Thanksgiving, Friends. I hope you and your loved ones experience the joy and peace that is the gift of a grateful heart. God Bless,
Tiffany Shedd Paid for by Shedd for Attorney General.
Authorized by Shedd for Attorney General.

body:
From Our Family to Yours [](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=b86f1d61a21547ea825e0c84998826a9&_e=Rnh_yrGHPgbQpwAgiAzYFK1N7S7Xq7Vcs5sLSGFczoRGtPRCAICNgpA5UJss396sFgdsbYGzMMHPqvqhdSxDA9Yv9nPRnzAJ_rR4Ao0oyJ5VNtGWYxb_aInU9NNX-LEDlU8S4kJ_Asn9UuIx4_WGjSu8kOYBD43TNeMog-c9Qa76ZAYovlq_PEBrQPz3z5P6NSZDPX9soCKU0XFK-uM2iUdungPY8ZR2PocolF5BBI3YYC8ZxwK-Zxd9qVZjoLL50vKM27TaUHbMYIDj1FKdMQ%3D%3D) _"I do, therefore, invite my fellow citizens in every part of the United States, and also those who are at sea and those who are sojourning in foreign lands, to set apart and observe the last Thursday of November next, as a day of Thanksgiving."_ _Pres. Abraham Lincoln (Oct. 3, 1863)_ Peter, Julie and I would like to wish you and your family a very happy and healthy Thanksgiving! We have so much to be thankful for this year – family, friends, neighbors, community, and much more. We’re especially thankful that so many families across Ventura County and the country will be able to resume their normal Thanksgiving traditions once again after last year’s disruptions. We hope you enjoy the turkey, your favorite sides, football (watching or playing), and the company of loved ones on this special day. Warm regards,
Julie and Matt Jacobs | | [](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=b86f1d61a21547ea825e0c84998826a9&_e=Rnh_yrGHPgbQpwAgiAzYFO4IkQX-hD2XzG39C_l-vyo3nTxuPkk3hgiRO9WRkNm8sD4J1iDxeit6-ok_JBqlpvrwpjYuwAMw4aUegcUDI3pNfdtVpcVwY8hNMBMtHN7-hbinpSg2vk43uKicvFMCcfk48qAhurytyX2ma7yDdJRd9TFCjSh2S2dv4EhtphZ9QIFU6R-Zj6QOvKTzltkcqjSlWS0tt3i-Ed8onH3Tfai--vGJ2OHyKezzzOsuMRfLpr1nCwahxUC5JXIGxmUOZQ%3D%3D) | [](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=b86f1d61a21547ea825e0c84998826a9&_e=Rnh_yrGHPgbQpwAgiAzYFMM1oNnx6fHSPt01L_AQwXMRoLsEqNhK_57sUeh1rQYINY3qPKJT-RyMjbMZOVj4ZPIeeu2Jk4oeyxCI-8z9SpaH5Xv_xRdgUt2Epkell4VsntYc_InGzf0IDU0zrc-Fm71Op2yi18C8dCBcOszGO8gUv0voQCQL95tCfhJvDRDoYGwYNhHF5AAbgPh1nna7__Lc81gPk6MyPuvJ33-i9GrO0LDqJ_dqUsO_SaTqBd4CpNOuFN-aFcCnrSrDuaWq3g%3D%3D) | [](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=b86f1d61a21547ea825e0c84998826a9&_e=Rnh_yrGHPgbQpwAgiAzYFCucUm1GAe8QFL-wmf2TkWw5Sjk8NLcwu2TZmt6RNHe18frz4ilLeH7Mn9CG0igC28pz9HqWwWsNYnhrqB89h3Oh2bCj2RD6LGuykWSgPY7Jpz4zgfz8XFd6uW0Up5Y5HjjWT0A9iOdJz0eQ7H7divRY38kYuSotn5b5J-KdEPp9YzDLHNMRhLAupoVeLbxtY2e-j2lGyl8qqZAPN9-oOeb9dIl0XHTDa97kq8O_4QfNRWvocw3FhgkPhf5zR3scbaCoXIMXN2p7k-topokbKvQ%3D) | [](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=b86f1d61a21547ea825e0c84998826a9&_e=Rnh_yrGHPgbQpwAgiAzYFOAeBtGK7I_5tWfN3VK5m_Ld-kA7NxPoGY9znWNaoncf0Aar2rt7M5Bv2KkVnbUsPWRrWNpVtydtLY2XysPsnzz5UjMxT5o6RS7Ife_tEFovDtI-9h3wGWZ76lUlZ3Sh3pfRQlv57TZ7Zoqc1ThofvfjHrA9wMdaqb_VcZ7hnvoZTSlpxHK35GcNwbW-kNyg-6OQkh_TvQskJ3tD1FZ3PQVfWpoA8PfKMyOMnKeDGkWEWumXj0VZxLedRUYKc1kLtVm9AX4rYfxNyUVC6C0teGM%3D)

We hope you enjoy the turkey, your favorite sides, football (watching or playing), and the company of loved ones on this special day. Warm regards, Julie and Matt Jacobs | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Matt Jacobs for Congress P.O. Box 4723 3435 E. Thousand Oaks Blvd, Thousand Oaks, CA 91359

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: They HATE Your Freedom
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GREENE FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58876277:J8hXFO23N:m:1:3253819041:74F4DD453288E0A7D5ED00B15062A6EF:r "Headline") Peter: I will never allow Nancy Pelosi to tell me what to do. I don't care how many times she threatens me, and I don't care how many times she fines me. I will not wear a face diaper - they do nothing to protect anyone. This, of course, forces Nancy to retire to her fainting couch in horror. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58876277:J8hXFO23N:m:1:3253819041:74F4DD453288E0A7D5ED00B15062A6EF:r "Nancy")**_Good. Angering Nancy Pelosi is the surest sign I know how to show I am on the right track.[If you agree, then your IMMEDIATE donation will help me continue to take actions that make her FURIOUS.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58876277:J8hXFO23N:m:1:3253819041:74F4DD453288E0A7D5ED00B15062A6EF:r "If you agree, then your IMMEDIATE donation will help me continue to
take actions that make her FURIOUS.")_** I was born in America, and I am free - my freedom is my birthright. That birthright is behind every vote I take in Congress, and I will never stop fighting for freedom. Sadly, for our nation, my commitment to our freedom makes me a target for so many powerful entities. **[I need to know if you are standing with those who would restrict your life to suit their ideals or if you stand with me as I fight for our freedom.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58876277:J8hXFO23N:m:1:3253819041:74F4DD453288E0A7D5ED00B15062A6EF:r "I need to know if you are standing with those who would restrict
your life to suit their ideals or if you stand with me as I fight for our freedom.")** They HATE our freedom and our unwillingness to accept their socialist takeover. They HATED President Trump for fighting to protect it. They HATE me for continuing that work. And that HATE colors every decision they make, just as my love for America colors every decision I make to uphold our Constitution. I will not wear a mask simply because Nancy Pelosi and Anthony Fauci decreed it, and I won't stop fighting for this nation. We will make decisions about our "public safety," and we'll never allow the radical left to force their demands on us. **[Not when I have patriots like you on my team.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58876277:J8hXFO23N:m:1:3253819041:74F4DD453288E0A7D5ED00B15062A6EF:r "Not when I have patriots like you on my team.")** Thank you. God Bless America. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58876277:J8hXFO23N:m:1:3253819041:74F4DD453288E0A7D5ED00B15062A6EF:r "Marjorie Taylor Greene")
Marjorie Taylor Greene
Congresswoman (R-GA)

name: Steve Sisolak
subject: Happy Thanksgiving, folks
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Committee to Elect Steve Sisolak
body:
| | |
---
| |
Hi there, I hope your Thanksgiving is off to a great start. Today, my family and I recognize we have _so_ much to be grateful for. When I think back on where we were this time last year, it’s humbling to realize how truly blessed we are. Being able to gather together with loved ones and celebrate this great American tradition is something we can’t take for granted. I’m incredibly thankful for my family, my friends, and that I’m part of a community of individuals fighting for progress in Nevada. Today and every day, I’m grateful to serve as the Governor of this great state. Wishing you and yours a wonderful day, Steve Sisolak

name: Josh Harder
subject: Happy Thanksgiving from me and Pam!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Harder for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/OAzB3skcpPA_34KLcr_QkY375IamcpxPEZmxaWWMTV8=/U_CAx988W9llwgy9ZNMljuEy6KdQL6iUMz97maXVgbg=?refcode=E12596-20211125-Thanksgiving-header-Holiday-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22) | Peter, I hope you and your family are enjoying your Thanksgiving - and aren't as overly stuffed as I currently am. Every year Pam and I take some time to reflect on our gratitudes and I just wanted to send a quick note to share a couple of my thoughts. First off, no matter how toxic our political environment may be, I still wake up incredibly grateful for the honor of representing my hometown. I love the Valley with all my heart, and advocating for our families who have been consistently overlooked is the most meaningful job I could ever have. I am so grateful Valley families put their trust in me. I'm thankful for each and every one of you who reads our emails - supporters like you help me stay in the fight. I try to stay true to who I am, and I hope our grassroots team sees how hard we're working to make our country a little bit of a better place. And finally, I know I wouldn't be here if it weren't for my incredibly supportive family. My wife, Pam, who brings all the love, wit and support that a partner can offer. My parents who helped instill me with the value of public service. And my younger brother David who I'm proud of every single day. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/OAzB3skcpPA_34KLcr_QkY375IamcpxPEZmxaWWMTV8=/U_CAx988W9llwgy9ZNMljuEy6KdQL6iUMz97maXVgbg=?refcode=E12596-20211125-Thanksgiving-graphic-Holiday-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22) So, from my family to yours, Happy Thanksgiving, Peter. \-- Josh
---
* * *

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/OAzB3skcpPA_34KLcr_QkY375IamcpxPEZmxaWWMTV8=/Bj9D4Yzaz_P_ZJpOw2lMURIdNvHVOobSnoex34Snpqw=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/OAzB3skcpPA_34KLcr_QkY375IamcpxPEZmxaWWMTV8=/TAbhnhcXHeznvSQpPrPQKRQOtq_FGCX7X5KBWg42KIQ=)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because CA-10 is one of our nation's most pivotal tossup districts. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, we understand. You can click [**here**](https://act.myngp.com/el/OAzB3skcpPA_34KLcr_QkY375IamcpxPEZmxaWWMTV8=/MWtf_lahrhJ06qCDmjHujvYhIs17CWaddqa5YtPTHlM=?recipientId=JGP1LIgKX8KYGR8WifkGL1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com) to get only the most important updates, or you can [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/OAzB3skcpPA_34KLcr_QkY375IamcpxPEZmxaWWMTV8=/g_N9aSfkwZ8FH8EIhxboXIDBZn1teBiPAUK574YOZo4=) here.
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/OAzB3skcpPA_34KLcr_QkY375IamcpxPEZmxaWWMTV8=/U_CAx988W9llwgy9ZNMljuEy6KdQL6iUMz97maXVgbg=?refcode=E12596-20211125-Thanksgiving-footer-Holiday-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22)
[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/OAzB3skcpPA_34KLcr_QkY375IamcpxPEZmxaWWMTV8=/U_CAx988W9llwgy9ZNMljuEy6KdQL6iUMz97maXVgbg=?refcode=E12596-20211125-Thanksgiving-footer-Holiday-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22)

Josh and his wife Pam live in Turlock where Josh grew up and delivered newspapers for the Turlock Journal. Josh was re-elected to Congress on behalf of families in the Central Valley where he's fighting to hold our government accountable, pass COVID-19 relief, and deliver on our progressive values. **[Will you help him keep up the fight in Congress by making a contribution today?](https://act.myngp.com/el/OAzB3skcpPA_34KLcr_QkY375IamcpxPEZmxaWWMTV8=/U_CAx988W9llwgy9ZNMljuEy6KdQL6iUMz97maXVgbg=?refcode=E12596-20211125-Thanksgiving-footer-Holiday-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22)**

body:

---
| |
---
| |
# 11/26 Door Knocking
Hey Team Carleah!

First off- we hope you're enjoying your Thanksgiving- we're certainly thankful for our supporters!

I'm sending this to share another upcoming volunteer opportunity on Friday (11/26)- we will once again be joining [Karen Simpson](https://carleahsummers.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1f56790a135a1d688e4182dde&id=bbe5a53fe1&e=3bc549893c), a candidate for delegate representing District 3A in Frederick, for door knocking.

**When?** Friday, November 26th from 9am to whenever we feel like stopping (leave whenever you need!)
**Where?** Starting from the Frederick Dems HQ at 1080 W Patrick St., Frederick, MD (Suite 4, tucked in the corner to the right of the ALDI grocery store in the Vista Shoppes/Hillcrest Plaza)
**What to bring?** Once again- comfortable walking shoes and excitement!

Also, thanks to everyone who was able to make it out last time! Together with Karen we knocked around 235 doors.

Once again, if you can't make it, we'd greatly appreciate a donation of any amount to help cover the costs of the campaign material we are dispersing.

Hope to see you there!

In solidarity,

Brett Guessford
_Campaign Advisor_

|
---

name: Sarah Godlewski
subject: Hello from Eau Claire!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
Happy Thanksgiving!

Today, I'm in Eau Claire with my family. I feel so grateful to be able to take a pause from the campaign trail and spend some much-needed quality time with them. As I'm sure you can imagine, it's been a hectic year since we launched this campaign, and I find days like today especially restorative.

It gives me a chance to sit down and reflect on what I’m most thankful for as 2021 comes to a close — particularly you. No one runs for office alone, and I could not do this without you. So whether you've attended an event, chipped in a few dollars, followed our campaign on social media, or reached out with a word of encouragement, your support matters a great deal to me. It keeps me going, even on the long days.

I’m thankful for all those who answer the call to serve — including our first responders, frontline workers, veterans, service members, and military families who sacrifice so much to protect this country. It also includes those who serve in our communities, like our teachers, non-profit and faith workers, just to name a few.

I want to acknowledge that this is also our second holiday season in a pandemic. Too many have endured tremendous loss since the start of this crisis, and I know not everyone's Thanksgiving table will be as full this year as it once was. My heart is with you.

Whatever form your day takes — whether it's ordering take-out for yourself and a loved one, a small gathering of friends, a big family get-together, or strangers coming together over a shared table — I hope your holiday is warm and wonderful.

Thank you for reading, and thanks for being a part of this.

Sarah

Contribute >> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/godlewski-november21

Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
Sarah for Wisconsin
PO Box 166
Madison, WI 53701
United States
This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails like this are the best way for us to stay in touch, but if you need to go, please unsubscribe here: [https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/3a820cf6-404d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8/63b07531-4a4e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2M2IwNzUzMS00YTRlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ed-DJ61V0tziN2kumOhY8HDM9I5h5qFDep8hdZ03WM4=&id=121241219] If you only wish to receive our most important updates, submit this form for fewer emails [https://action.sarahforwisconsin.com/a/less-email]. If you'd like to support Sarah's campaign for U.S. Senate in Wisconsin, please add a donation [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/godlewski-donate?refcode=em2021&amount=10] to help us win.

Have a question? Reply to this email.

subject: Happy Thanksgiving from Team Collins!

body:
****
Susan and all of us at Team Collins wanted to take a quick moment to wish you and your family a wonderful Thanksgiving!
To unsubscribe click [here](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDYwMDAyNTkS1&kn=4&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MjEyMjgyNTk3MwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Peter,

Susan and all of us at Team Collins wanted to take a quick moment to wish you and your family a wonderful Thanksgiving!
We know the last two years have been difficult for many Americans so we hope you get a chance to spend a few days making wonderful memories with family and friends.
One of the things Susan and our team are most thankful for is all of the support we continue to receive from folks all over the country.
The ability for Susan to go to work everyday and represent the great state of Maine is only possible because of supporters like you. And we can't thank you enough!
Thank you for everything and Happy Thanksgiving!
Team Collins

name: Mike Pompeo
subject: I've Made A Decision
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
People keep asking what my plans are for the next election. Well, I've made a decision.
& nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?2xpa0--fgxr-4qqlpo6&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

|
| | | | [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2xpa0-1mhf2-4qqlpo6/)
---

People have been asking me recently what my plans are for the upcoming election. As one of our top America First supporters, I wanted you to be one of the first to know that I've made a decision:

**I’m 100% committed to helping Republicans win office all across the country in 2022, and I'm focusing all efforts on just that. **

That’s why I formed CAVPAC - my political organization committed to electing principled conservative leaders who won't be silenced and who refuse to give an inch to the radical Left. I’m traveling all over the country to push our candidates to victory and to fire up Republicans to turn out and vote.

**Momentum is on our side, and we must seize the moment and double down on championing American values.**

While some people are just sitting silently on the sidelines, I’m staying in the fight to save America and to champion the core values that make America great.

Do you support this mission? If so, **[please rush an emergency donation of $100, $50 or $20 to help us keep up the momentum.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2xpa0-1mhf3-4qqlpo7/ "please rush an emergency donation of $100, $50 or $20 to help us keep up the momentum.")**

---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2xpa0-1mhf4-4qqlpo8/)
---

My time working as President Trump’s Secretary of State and CIA Director has put a target on my back. While a lot of people talk about what they WOULD do, I’ve actually gotten the job done and delivered BIG WINS for the American First agenda - from freeing three captives in North Korea to ensuring Iranian terrorists like Qasem Soleimani never threaten our freedom again. That’s made me some enemies, and they are hoping we fail.

**There is nothing the radical Left and their friends in the Fake News media love more than to mock and attack those of us close to President Trump. **

That’s why I am hoping you will **[rush a quick contribution to help me champion America values and elect more America First conservatives.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2xpa0-1mhf5-4qqlpo9/ "rush a quick contribution to help me champion America values and elect more America First conservatives.")** The mainstream media and their Democrat friends want to say that our movement is dead, but we cannot let that happen!

---
| | [DONATE NOW](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2xpa0-1mhf6-4qqlpo0/)
---

You know me, you know my record and you know that I will never stop fighting for America. With you on our team, I know we can defeat the Democrats and get back to delivering real results for the American people.

Unapologetically American,
---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2xpa0-1mhf7-4qqlpo1/)
---

Mike Pompeo
70th Secretary of State

---
| |
Help Champion American Values: Text **CHAMPION **to **29910**
---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2xpa0-1mhf8-4qqlpo2/ "Mike Pompeo is Calling on All Conservatives")
---

Personal note from Mike Pompeo:

I need your help if we are going to **WIN BIG** for Republicans in the upcoming elections.

I've spent my life fighting for our American values, and I'm keeping that fight alive by supporting principled conservative candidates all across the country. **[Will you chip in to help us stop the radical Left from turning America into a socialist country?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2xpa0-1mhf9-4qqlpo3/ "Will you chip in to help us stop the radical Left from turning America into a socialist country?")**

Thanks again for all that you do, and let's keep up the good work!

-Mike

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: Something IMPORTANT From My Heart... | Jackson Lahmeyer
body:
Some Thoughts While Relaxing On Thanksgiving... As I am sitting here in Marlow, Oklahoma enjoying the winding down of Thanksgiving after eating way t
| | [](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=1452500.902.1.407bab08e98e484d94998007795f060a) |
---
## Some Thoughts While Relaxing On Thanksgiving...
---
As I am sitting here in Marlow, Oklahoma enjoying the winding down of Thanksgiving after eating way too much, I have a few thoughts. It's the desire to see justice flow like a river and righteousness like a never ending stream from Washington DC has brought us together in this newfound Freedom movement. We are on team #SaveAmerica. Our nation is at war right now and it's not a battle between Republicans & Democrats; it's a battle between Good and Evil. Our movement is on the side of good but we have to be intentional with a few things in order to win this great battle. **UNITY** Psalm 133:1 says, _“How good and pleasant it is when God’s people live together in unity!”_ An elderly father had four sons who were always fighting with each other. He had his sons come over to give them a lesson. When they came, their father gave them a bundle of sticks and said, “Can you break these sticks?” The first son tried to break the bundle but couldn't. Then, the second and third sons tried to break the bundle of sticks, but they couldn’t either. Meanwhile, the youngest was very clever and took one stick out at a time and easily broke all of them one by one. The father then smiled at his sons and said, “My sons, do you understand what happened? It is always easy to break the sticks one by one. But when they are bundled together, none of you could break them." It's beyond important that we each do our part to maintain unity within this great movement to #SaveAmerica. **ENGAGEMENT** Galatians 6:9 says, _"Let us not become weary in doing good, for at the proper time we will reap a harvest if we do not give up."_ So many of us have been fighting the good fight for a while now and it's easy to get tired and discouraged. But we must continue doing good. WE ARE GOING TO WIN THIS WAR. In order to win we must each use our TIME, TALENT & TREASURE. The most incredible thing happened over the last 2 months. When Former Vice President Joe Biden declared war on the American people by declaring we will either take the jab or lose our job, something amazing happen. The American people fought back and looked out for each other. I started the NO VACCINE MANDATE petition on my website and nearly 100,000 people have signed that petition but what's even more incredible is the amount of people who shared the link - www.jacksonlahmeyer.com/nomandate - with their friends and family members to help them save their jobs by downloading the COVID19 Religious Exemption form. I have personally signed over 50,000 Religious Exemption forms and thousands upon thousands have been able to keep their jobs without getting the jab. These thousands of jobs were saved because we all worked together to spread word. We must stay engaged. Do me a favor. Please text the link www.jacksonlahmeyer.com/nomandate to 5 people tonight and ask them to sign the NO VACCINE MANDATE petition and let them know if their employer is requiring to take the jab they do not have to comply but can fight back. On this Thanksgiving I'm grateful the Lord has brought us together. Let's continue doing good together in unity and we will see VICTORY! Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer

clean_body: Some Thoughts While Relaxing On Thanksgiving... As I am sitting here in Marlow, Oklahoma enjoying the winding down of Thanksgiving after eating way t | | | Some Thoughts While Relaxing On Thanksgiving... As I am sitting here in Marlow, Oklahoma enjoying the winding down of Thanksgiving after eating way too much, I have a few thoughts. It's the desire to see justice flow like a river and righteousness like a never ending stream from Washington DC has brought us together in this newfound Freedom movement. We are on team #SaveAmerica. Our nation is at war right now and it's not a battle between Republicans & Democrats; it's a battle between Good and Evil. Our movement is on the side of good but we have to be intentional with a few things in order to win this great battle. UNITY Psalm 133:1 says, “How good and pleasant it is when God’s people live together in unity!” An elderly father had four sons who were always fighting with each other. He had his sons come over to give them a lesson. When they came, their father gave them a bundle of sticks and said, “Can you break these sticks?” The first son tried to break the bundle but couldn't. Then, the second and third sons tried to break the bundle of sticks, but they couldn’t either. Meanwhile, the youngest was very clever and took one stick out at a time and easily broke all of them one by one. The father then smiled at his sons and said, “My sons, do you understand what happened? It is always easy to break the sticks one by one. But when they are bundled together, none of you could break them." It's beyond important that we each do our part to maintain unity within this great movement to #SaveAmerica. ENGAGEMENT Galatians 6:9 says, "Let us not become weary in doing good, for at the proper time we will reap a harvest if we do not give up." So many of us have been fighting the good fight for a while now and it's easy to get tired and discouraged. But we must continue doing good. WE ARE GOING TO WIN THIS WAR. In order to win we must each use our TIME, TALENT & TREASURE. The most incredible thing happened over the last 2 months. When Former Vice President Joe Biden declared war on the American people by declaring we will either take the jab or lose our job, something amazing happen. The American people fought back and looked out for each other. I started the NO VACCINE MANDATE petition on my website and nearly 100,000 people have signed that petition but what's even more incredible is the amount of people who shared the link - www.jacksonlahmeyer.com/nomandate - with their friends and family members to help them save their jobs by downloading the COVID19 Religious Exemption form. I have personally signed over 50,000 Religious Exemption forms and thousands upon thousands have been able to keep their jobs without getting the jab. These thousands of jobs were saved because we all worked together to spread word. We must stay engaged. Do me a favor. Please text the link www.jacksonlahmeyer.com/nomandate to 5 people tonight and ask them to sign the NO VACCINE MANDATE petition and let them know if their employer is requiring to take the jab they do not have to comply but can fight back. On this Thanksgiving I'm grateful the Lord has brought us together. Let's continue doing good together in unity and we will see VICTORY! name: Jack Ballard
subject: Happy Thanksgiving!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JACK BALLARD FOR MONTANA
body:
Friends, Happy Thanksgiving! We hope you have a wonderful day celebrating with the people you love. We’re wishing you a happy holiday filled with m | | | [](http://links.ballardformontana.com/u/click?_t=01481013522b4e28a72d84f828a757ef&_m=db683a53c65149f0bd6ddd47e8b8b472&_e=QSdsEYTA0LMhVGQ4e8h2qMFJ7aCXNM_4BNS8Qj5mwWRDdrQL2V5GjN2OvENGsHiE2sQPLqvBy8PwMtB9-gQSjgrPx8118Iri9W3ewcZXd_H8UD6EXtSN2sUVITE71LxRLR-9fac2IK94grfsTIqhEOivhqiSqauSgFMCUaSp9izspJCD7Jni13azuqQ1eaj-ZW5vpL5eq3cbPmdyZwEjAgBgDUFPknnRMt668P9vh_nFTIE3Yi95jkS63y_i1hjUuYVtTdW5HoFzq8TDZMr7CZOgEMXBMYdDGcW2QzwfipUyrztVmPy3gCYfplNkxWV1O-xTcmEPV-Ntptgj4RZbzcfwSOJTYUHXgo3ze_mN28txKD8vML_Q5ZLblU0rcM0YOq4g_8zQt8KFfDT98nGeN8p9E_CyKoRpuMyKdy894shuffSG3LQ-4UzsCwJ2CglvPqyVGU5rHbhFukpR2O3B6PCokyN4om55imzunHCsnQ4%3D) Friends, Happy Thanksgiving! I hope you have a wonderful day celebrating with the people you love. We’re wishing you a happy holiday filled with memories, laughter, good food, friends, and family. There are many things my team and I are truly grateful for, and this year, your support is at the top of our list. Thank you for standing with us in this fight. Thanksgiving has always been one of my favorite holidays, but it feels particularly so this year celebrating with family worry-free thanks to the Covid vaccine. I love campaigning and speaking with you all, but today is truly a great day of relaxation, reflection, and just being with family who I love dearly. I hope you’re able to have a similar experience today and regardless, I wish you the best. Yours truly,
Jack Ballard
Jack Ballard grew up on a ranch west of Three Forks homesteaded by his grandfather in 1907. He knows how to fight for Montana and he intends to fight for you and MT-02 in Washington D.C. **[CONTRIBUTE MONTHLY](http://links.ballardformontana.com/u/click?_t=01481013522b4e28a72d84f828a757ef&_m=db683a53c65149f0bd6ddd47e8b8b472&_e=QSdsEYTA0LMhVGQ4e8h2qMFJ7aCXNM_4BNS8Qj5mwWRDdrQL2V5GjN2OvENGsHiE2sQPLqvBy8PwMtB9-gQSjgrPx8118Iri9W3ewcZXd_H8UD6EXtSN2sUVITE71LxRLR-9fac2IK94grfsTIqhEOivhqiSqauSgFMCUaSp9izspJCD7Jni13azuqQ1eaj-ZW5vpL5eq3cbPmdyZwEjAgBgDUFPknnRMt668P9vh_nFTIE3Yi95jkS63y_i1hjUPWVUwrB5tYmb-oryb0Jue7Ul-1cCYfm76c72c3WExCs9cMqbsqicu4b3K5W-vTPY_cy2DHHwmeeelRWa48dDvu4VkRfvWODVCS79grYQeccht12i4CCEpAKj3zOqvfjSEp44nFmFlcf56ofEsZR-bsyiAn_M5Wchra48J1pt9KXAbArd7nqF9fiMI9xMnh9gGshSF_BCSZ6PSv23O_2ShkZyQVJV_HrBijyMx3hU62hbOSidpALs9khpd6XhJ3Zz)**** ** PAID FOR BY JACK BALLARD FOR MONTANA.

name: Ruth Gao
subject: Happy Thanksgiving
body:
A time of thankfulness and reflection | _You're receiving this email because of your support for Democrats. But we don't want to send anyone an email who doesn't want to receive it. Please click here to [unsubscribe.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnk7ZdSh6orelFHVYOgakF1Tc9w1V-sz7FiGW0r77bIcnnhA4JhvMzOyCQn5xaW1SVVbCDyEfjjb0WSswLM4GDt3rpa2WV7Y524reTk92iVm4RoPpNaKQkChsji3TE7r0j8IxAyWK1FO8qXBW-6vWUHYoFuIUIoDnI9do3Q1sb7NQvj0RDTGOi-dJolCGJ7cHgiszb8CnHwwqhk_fLyIBxr-8R_WgeEv2iintBMalG00OQ/3hb/mEyJQpWdRW-yqdXB34oUQg/h0/D_9vTc1rHPPrU1vCwM44LYnFK1_IIQNlf_TeO-Py2d8)_
---
|
---
|
---
Hey Peter, today, like so many Americans, I am taking time to enjoy family and remember the good things in life that I am thankful for. As I think about this year and the start of my race for as a democrat for US Senate I am thankful for two main reasons:
1. **The amazing people of Kentucky.** As I travel and meet people I am thankful to be a part of this state and to be surrounded by so many hard-working and compassionate people. I know that people sometimes look at Kentucky and think there is no hope for new leadership. However, as I talk to people I hear hope and a desire for change. This is so encouraging as we work together, through often hard days, for new and caring leadership in Kentucky.
2. **Your support.** I have been overwhelmed with the support I have already received in donations and help from so many. If we want to see change we need new voices in this conversation and I am thankful for each of you believing in our movement to see new leadership in Kentucky. This would be completely impossible to accomplish without your support. And when I am elected I know that each of you personally helped see that happen.

---
As we head into this season of holidays I am excited for even more opportunities to meet people throughout Kentucky. We are focusing on getting in touch, via call or mail, with every Democratic voter in Kentucky. I believe that flipping this state will require us to build relationships with individual voters, and we are working towards just that. **Please consider continuing to help me fight to see a leader in Washington who cares about the people of this state and seeks to lift them up. Join us by donating TODAY to our low-dollar grassroots movement.**
---

clean_body: A time of thankfulness and reflection | You're receiving this email because of your support for Democrats. But we don't want to send anyone an email who doesn't want to receive it. Please click here to | | Hey Peter, today, like so many Americans, I am taking time to enjoy family and remember the good things in life that I am thankful for. As I think about this year and the start of my race for as a democrat for US Senate I am thankful for two main reasons: 1. The amazing people of Kentucky. As I travel and meet people I am thankful to be a part of this state and to be surrounded by so many hard-working and compassionate people. I know that people sometimes look at Kentucky and think there is no hope for new leadership. However, as I talk to people I hear hope and a desire for change. This is so encouraging as we work together, through often hard days, for new and caring leadership in Kentucky. 2. Your support. I have been overwhelmed with the support I have already received in donations and help from so many. If we want to see change we need new voices in this conversation and I am thankful for each of you believing in our movement to see new leadership in Kentucky. This would be completely impossible to accomplish without your support. And when I am elected I know that each of you personally helped see that happen. As we head into this season of holidays I am excited for even more opportunities to meet people throughout Kentucky. We are focusing on getting in touch, via call or mail, with every Democratic voter in Kentucky. I believe that flipping this state will require us to build relationships with individual voters, and we are working towards just that. Please consider continuing to help me fight to see a leader in Washington who cares about the people of this state and seeks to lift them up. Join us by donating TODAY to our low-dollar grassroots movement. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Together we can win this, | | | | | | | ?linkid=14&canid=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-why-i-am-running-for-us-senate&emailreferrer=email1360552&emailsubject=happy-thanksgiving Contact us at: mailto:info@ruthgao.com To donate by check, please mail to PO Box 20152, Louisville, KY 40250 (Please include your address, employer, and occupation for FEC filing purposes) Any donations to Ruth Gao for KY are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. | | Sent via . name: Jesse
subject: Happy Thanksgiving, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jesse Jensen for Congress
body:
Big government thinks they know best _Peter,_ _This has been a crazy year._ _The kind of year that makes me especially thankful for my family and the great country we live in. As you may or may not know, I've been working closely with other veterans on a project called Task Force Argo, you can read more about the work we've done**[here](http://links.jessejensen4congress.com/u/click?_t=786fb8edbf8a46a08085e4b6fadd3f18&_m=bc4de9086f934d529065732a2ff47e74&_e=RGN9Bc37nwfCILCxa2Ia9sAcjzKyugd6_hI17TtsyGWRyhUMlCVwGPylg46kqlp0I9AHsZw_f3_ym2rLfj87YSWOccF-erfxrejLnz7YBVcz6eBkc-cSlkbfS2syqIOxRehBsAVnX0h-oeO6SOxPcjV0Gsetqb9XJsiix2JvFt-z2jWaIWtpOYEvWptX-jX3SjkprcdcBAsNvHJEi5dYWyChsYFUUXrcWcSOArMkdzhc720loK7pGe13hVEJrl-qiZpXOhJzyxKbHQmFhWUK3fk578CTkFUwsSRbvcYbgY0vAMTJXeODarHNyTR2PxeeAqn3TB_gxSCbpR7aQ6EasGymWnBDhxLaxjsSqhIj0o-7MydDTWbmAA76rSvDe8t4)** _ _The evacuated Americans' stories are unique -- from an infant born on the anniversary of 9/11 to an 81-year-old -- but the one thing that binds them together is their appreciation and dedication to our nation's highest ideals, even through unimaginable difficulties._ _On this uniquely American holiday, today isn't about politics or bickering over what divides us.**It's about being thankful.**_ _And I want to know what you're thankful for, Peter:[_**RESPOND HERE!**_](http://links.jessejensen4congress.com/u/click?_t=786fb8edbf8a46a08085e4b6fadd3f18&_m=bc4de9086f934d529065732a2ff47e74&_e=RGN9Bc37nwfCILCxa2Ia9r1OnI27l_8RtP_b5yTwdIIX5MLgGWlYuY7fQSYoElLWB2uxEW0YoASpMQYTSguyYPipK24ay0FvFRiW5SaWMP2jCysJu0TiKGOPTQldZK6XUhnDgG14lU9KiBfFG2CNF0ktJskADhReDdKzFYn9xIIBHd8Mo81cKeyiLF1h03yEHIfN94PsYIxvD0sYVNTyIQcJvaO3NUH3NZmogxgAZcAfIaFol6Z_b8tdeaK1Uxv-kUgQzEXyZv74IW2rkFY9wpfx-fOk3vHrzoXLaEKWvJZklMGOh4bE1_oxCZA3rVeA0n59ZIWzM1pzEMYw6HxwcCombJDWNf2FXKD2E3b4-_JdYnMxnBsnF748NCuDUT6ygNFcpj_YzpA2v7IeutOq_HMts2Zl5b17Thnvlb9sWFELbxanmA3Uza7B16uXVSJdpCZkkwFq26oHKI6y0VfAREIxmCUc5EMjYT7wAR9eHGg%3D)_ Fellow Conservative -- Sorry to bother you but this is an emergency. **House Democrats just launched a NATIONWIDE scheme to expand their Liberal Majority by crushing every last ally of President Trump.**
_I don’t sugarcoat anything with you:_
This is a disaster. Especially now given that I’m behind on my can't-miss fundraising goal of $250,000. [**I only have a few hours left so I’m coming directly to you for support.**](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2xpyi-1mhk7-4qqlpo7/)

House Republicans have a once-in-a-generation chance to deliver a crushing blow to Nancy Pelosi and her cronies. **But if Democrats outraise us and reach more voters, everything we've worked for will be completely destroyed.**
Believe me: I wouldn't be bothering you again if there was another way to win.
[**So I have to ask: Can you please chip in before midnight tonight.**](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2xpyi-1mhk9-4qqlpo9/)
You won't regret it.
For America,
Steve Scalise (Republican Whip)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jerry?=
subject: Happy Thanksgiving!
body:
| | | |
---
| **Happy Thanksgiving!**
---
| | |
---
| Hi Friends! Happy Thanksgiving to you and your family. I pray that God's peace, blessings, providence, health, joy, and hope would be upon you and your family. Today is the day where America celebrates Thanksgiving - not only to give thanks, but give thanks specifically to God for his amazing providence towards our lives and our great nation. Taking time to stop and give thanks to God opens our eyes to see all the blessing He has given us, even if we’re going through times of hardship. God’s blessing has been upon America in astounding ways for centuries, and I believe it will continue. I thank God for all that he will do in the future. Please join me today in giving thanks and praise to God for how he has blessed your life and America. God bless you & your family, and God bless America

-Jerry, Lisa, Michael, & Levi Evans

clean_body: | | | | | Happy Thanksgiving! | | | | Hi Friends! Happy Thanksgiving to you and your family. I pray that God's peace, blessings, providence, health, joy, and hope would be upon you and your family. Today is the day where America celebrates Thanksgiving - not only to give thanks, but give thanks specifically to God for his amazing providence towards our lives and our great nation. Taking time to stop and give thanks to God opens our eyes to see all the blessing He has given us, even if we’re going through times of hardship. God’s blessing has been upon America in astounding ways for centuries, and I believe it will continue. I thank God for all that he will do in the future. Please join me today in giving thanks and praise to God for how he has blessed your life and America. God bless you & your family, and God bless America -Jerry, Lisa, Michael, & Levi Evans Please check out my to learn more about me and for our country, and follow me one of my social media accounts to keep up with my journey. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2020 - Jerry Evans for Illinois, All rights reserved. body:
URGENT POLL
| | **We emailed you last week about our ANTI-GOP poll, and we were SHOCKED to see your name missing.**

We know you’re a loyal Democrat... this can’t be right! **We still need 400 responses for our data to be conclusive:**
[PLEASE, TELL US: WHO DO YOU THINK IS THE WORST REPUBLICAN?! >> >>](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/anti-gop_flash_poll/?refcode=VPP_20211125_EMPOLL_E1_T0_NS&t=6&akid=964%2E878179%2EE0QOyh) | **ANSWER OUR FLASH POLL** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/anti-gop_flash_poll/?refcode=VPP_20211125_EMPOLL_E1_T0_NS&t=7&akid=964%2E878179%2EE0QOyh) **1,000 DEMOCRATIC RESPONSES NEEDED** | [TAKE THE FLASH POLL »](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/anti-gop_flash_poll/?refcode=VPP_20211125_EMPOLL_E1_T0_NS&t=8&akid=964%2E878179%2EE0QOyh)
---
**FIRST:** Republicans echoed and amplified Donald Trump’s Big Lie.

**THEN:** Far-right Senators REFUSED to hold Trump accountable for his violent Jan. 6 coup attempt!

**NOW:** MAGA Republicans are proposing -- and passing! -- hundreds of voter suppression bills all across the country DESIGNED to rig the rules in their favor.

To defeat these anti-Democracy Republicans, we need an unified effort _right now._

[ So please, respond to our ANTI-GOP FLASH POLL by midnight >>](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/anti-gop_flash_poll/?refcode=VPP_20211125_EMPOLL_E1_T0_NS&t=9&akid=964%2E878179%2EE0QOyh)
[ANSWER NOW: WHO IS THE WORST MAGA REPUBLICAN?! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/anti-gop_flash_poll/?refcode=VPP_20211125_EMPOLL_E1_T0_NS&t=10&akid=964%2E878179%2EE0QOyh)
---
Your response will help us defeat Republicans nationwide.

_\-- VPP_

(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To ending partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=964%2E878179%2EE0QOyh). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=964%2E878179%2EE0QOyh).**
